faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Management, Computer Applications, Pharmacy, etc.

At the UG level, Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology offers BTech and BPharm courses to students. At the PG level, the college offers MBA, , , and other courses to students. The college also provides value-added programmes to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology and their respective eligibility and Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology fee structure:

faqs.question: What documents are required admission to various courses at Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    SRMS College Bareilly offers a total of 72 seats for its BPharma course. Candidates willing to secure BPharma seats must qualify for the CUET exam and participate in counselling for 85% seat allocation. However, seats are also offered based on the class 12 exam merit for the remaining 15% and vacant/lapsed seats. Find below the seat bifurcation of the BPharma course:CoursesSeatsBachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma. Lateral Entry)12Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.)60
faqs.question: What is the BPharma seat intake at SRMS College?

faqs.answer: A:    In order to apply for BPharma course the candidate need to meet the last educational qualification. Aspirants should complete Class 12 with 55% aggregate in PCM/Biology/Biotech). For Lateral Entry, the candidate should complete Diploma in pharmacy with 60% aggregate.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for BPharma at Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Shri Ram Murti Engineering College Bareilly accepts JEE Main scores. A total of 85% seat intake of all branches is allotted according to the merit list of JEE Main through online counselling. Similarly,  15% seats of total intake & vacant/lapsed seats in all branches are allocated based on merit of Class 12 marks (with 60% aggregate marks in PCM).

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure, but the faculty has less knowledge about the subject.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% - 80% of our previous batch got placed, but mostly off campus. Packages range from 3 LPA (the lowest) to 12 LPA (the highest) with an average of 5-6 LPA. Top recruiters on the campus were Co-Forage. Many students secure internships in IT firms as developers, analysts, and intern engineers.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our department has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs (some of the computers do not work), and a library. Hostels are clean with Wi-Fi, decent mess food, canteen options, medical care, and sports facilities that are good both indoors and outdoors, ensuring overall student well-being.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it is a good college with good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placement is nice if students really work for it, but the college also provides various courses that are good. The average package was 3 LPA, and most were placed. They also provide internships that are really beneficial and can help in the growth of the student. Hence, overall, the impression of placement is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, old, but regularly maintained. The greenery is very pretty and mesmerizing. Classes are well equipped with AC and projectors, and labs are fully air-conditioned, with cleanliness maintained. Various facilities are available for sports, such as a huge football and cricket ground, along with volleyball, basketball, and squash courts.

overview_faqs.question: Is Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology approved?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technolog is approved by approved by AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education) and offers programmes in affiliation with the AKTU - Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University (UPTU). To get admission to this AICTE-approved college, candidates must have valid scores in accepted entrance exams.

overview_faqs.question: Why should I pursue MCA course at Shri Ram Murti Engineering College, Bareilly?
overview_faqs.answer: MCA full form is Master of Computer Applications. It is a two-year postgraduate program that focuses on Mastering in computer applications. It is designed for students aspiring to build a career in computer applications and software development. Students can check the list of reasons to pursue MCA course from Shri Ram Murti Engineering College Bareilly:It provides a strong foundation in both theoretical and practical aspects of computer science, preparing students for advanced roles in technology and innovation.For BCA graduates, pursuing an MCA degree enhances their career prospects.MCA graduates and Engineering graduates are usually hired for the same job profiles.The average salary of an entry-level programmer ranges between INR 3.8 LPA to INR 9 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Not at all value for money.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities aren't good enough, not even half of the students in the batch are placed, and those who are placed are hired by a mass recruiter. The average package is 3 LPA, and mostly students are placed on that package. These states are just for attracting newbies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decent, and the hostel rooms are good in comparison to other colleges. The labs are also good, but the system that students use is outdated. The mess food in the hostel is average but edible. The campus has grounds for various sports, which is the only thing I love in this college, you have separate football and cricket grounds, which you can access whenever you want.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: College is good for topper students.

content.Placements: Approximately 70 to 80% of students are placed in a particular batch on an average package of 3 to 5 LPA. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.5 LPA. Around 10% students secured internships through the college, but there are no good internships.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious, well ventilated, and equipped with projectors/whiteboards. The library is also good and well mentioned, and only old books are available for students. Computer labs are good, they have all out date setup and software as well as hardware.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure, but the faculty has less knowledge about the subject.

content.Placements: Around 70% - 80% of our previous batch got placed, but mostly off campus. Packages range from 3 LPA (the lowest) to 12 LPA (the highest) with an average of 5-6 LPA. Top recruiters on the campus were Co-Forage. Many students secure internships in IT firms as developers, analysts, and intern engineers.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs (some of the computers do not work), and a library. Hostels are clean with Wi-Fi, decent mess food, canteen options, medical care, and sports facilities that are good both indoors and outdoors, ensuring overall student well-being.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is a good college with good faculty members.

content.Placements: Placement is nice if students really work for it, but the college also provides various courses that are good. The average package was 3 LPA, and most were placed. They also provide internships that are really beneficial and can help in the growth of the student. Hence, overall, the impression of placement is good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, old, but regularly maintained. The greenery is very pretty and mesmerizing. Classes are well equipped with AC and projectors, and labs are fully air-conditioned, with cleanliness maintained. Various facilities are available for sports, such as a huge football and cricket ground, along with volleyball, basketball, and squash courts.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Best college for scholarships (government and in-college scholarships).

content.Placements: The college has a good placement record, with an average package of 5 LPA. The highest package is about 35 LPA, and the lowest package is around 3 LPA. There are 99% actual placements, a good placement cell, and good contacts. The college also provides good guidance during placement sessions, and placements are increasing every year.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi connectivity is okay; the hostel is neat and clean and provides all facilities, with good food and snacks. CS, IT, mechanical, and AIML are almost famous courses and branches. It is famous for CS-themed placements and is enough for enjoying college life.

admission_process.title: Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology Bareilly Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology admission 2025is currently open. The college offers courses, such as BTech, BBA, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. To get admission toShri Ram Murti Engineering College Bareilly, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The college offers more than 12 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Business and Management, etc. The application process at Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology is conducted online. The college is affiliated withAKTU. Read the following article to know more aboutSRMSCE course admission2025.

The mode of study for various courses is full-time. To enrol for various course admissions, candidates must complete the last educational qualification set by the college. For BTech course, 85% of seats in all the branches are allocated to the merit list of JEE Main. For the rest of the 15% seats, all the branches are allocated based on merit of Class 12 and brief object assessment. Read on to know more aboutSRMSCET course admissions2025.

Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology courses' admissions are based on the entrance exam as per respective courses. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularShri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology courses:
Note: *The candidate having valid score card of GPAT is exempted from entrance test conducted by Dr. A.P.J.Abdual Kalam Technical University, Lucknow.

Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology admission process includes entrance exam scores for various courses. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at SRMSCET is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to various programs, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://myportal.srms.ac.in/onlineregistration. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

The institute considers various entrance exam scores such as JEE Main, CAT, XAT, etc, for admission to the BTech, MBA among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for the final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theShri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering & Technology feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

paragraphs: Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology (SRMS CET) has a Placement Cell that helps shape students' careers from their induction and orientation, summer internships, and mid-term projects to their final placements and even beyond.

The placement process at Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology includes a comprehensive pre-placement training and skill development program for the students. The final placements at Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology are a result of very systematic interaction with the industry and continuous career counselling of the students. The top recruiters of Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology in recent years included TCS, Wipro, Decathlon, Kotak Mahindra, UPL, Asian Paints, Sun Pharma, AMI Organics, FMC, JB Healthcare, Polycab, etc.

description: Shri Ram Murti Engineering College Bareilly cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Shri Ram Murti Engineering College Bareilly UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Shri Ram Murti Engineering College Bareilly cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Shri Ram Murti Engineering College Bareilly BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 891326 and 1314068 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Elect

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 891326 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 629612 in 2023.

Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Shri Ram Murti Engineering College Bareilly can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Shri Ram Murti Engineering College Bareilly JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. For 2025, in the last round, the top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence), followed by B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), and B.Tech. in Information Technology, with the closing ranks of , and , respectively.

hostel.description: Hostels are equipped with single, double and triple seated rooms and facilities available includes separate mess for boys and girls which provide vegetarian food only, common rooms with facilities of Indoor games like Table Tennis, Chess, Carrom, etc, and with cable connection, 15 hours library facility, facility for outdoor games like Volleyball, Basketball, Cricket, Hockey, Football, Squash Court, Badminton Court, Lawn Tennis and a running track is provided.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Football Ground, Squash Court, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Chess Boards, Carom Boards, Hockey Field, Table Tennis, Billiards, Kho- Kho, Squash Court

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Language Lab

reviews.review_heading: Not at all value for money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent, and the hostel rooms are good in comparison to other colleges. The labs are also good, but the system that students use is outdated. The mess food in the hostel is average but edible. The campus has grounds for various sports, which is the only thing I love in this college, you have separate football and cricket grounds, which you can access whenever you want.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for topper students.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious, well ventilated, and equipped with projectors/whiteboards. The library is also good and well mentioned, and only old books are available for students. Computer labs are good, they have all out date setup and software as well as hardware.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, but the faculty has less knowledge about the subject.
reviews.review_text: Our department has Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, labs (some of the computers do not work), and a library. Hostels are clean with Wi-Fi, decent mess food, canteen options, medical care, and sports facilities that are good both indoors and outdoors, ensuring overall student well-being.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college with good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, old, but regularly maintained. The greenery is very pretty and mesmerizing. Classes are well equipped with AC and projectors, and labs are fully air-conditioned, with cleanliness maintained. Various facilities are available for sports, such as a huge football and cricket ground, along with volleyball, basketball, and squash courts.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for scholarships (government and in-college scholarships).
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connectivity is okay; the hostel is neat and clean and provides all facilities, with good food and snacks. CS, IT, mechanical, and AIML are almost famous courses and branches. It is famous for CS-themed placements and is enough for enjoying college life.

reviews.review_heading: It provides a disciplined and focused academic environment.
reviews.review_text: The campus has decent infrastructure with well-equipped labs, AC classrooms, a big library, a canteen, a multipurpose complex, and clean surroundings. Hostels are well-maintained, with good security, Wi-Fi, and hygienic food. Overall, it is comfortable for students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty and overall environment.
reviews.review_text: Nice infrastructure and facilities are available, including a volleyball court, a basketball court, a huge cricket and football ground. Nature around the campus is also very nice and has beautiful flowers that enhance the beauty of the place. Classes are well-equipped with AC.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review for SRMS from a third-year student.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are pretty decent. Labs have decent desktops for coding while all the labs have Wi-Fi for smooth study. Classrooms are smaller in size but have air conditioning. Library is good in our college with a lot of books which can be issued for a week and then re-issue to make our studies smooth. Hostels are decent to live in. The food provided is good to eat but not everyone may like it. The sports facility is the best among all the colleges in Bareilly.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Bareilly region for sure.
reviews.review_text: For B.Tech students, particularly there is a Wi-Fi facility available for all the hostelers. Labs have updated computer systems with Windows 11 and latest-gen processors. AC classrooms and a huge library with a variety of books to learn. Decent facilities in hostel, good water supply, decent food quality in mess and canteen as well. Good medical facilities, as SRMS Trust owns SRMS Medical College. All types of sports, such as volleyball courts, football ground, dedicated cricket stadium, basketb...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the facilities and safety. Placement in recent years are bad, but teachers are great.
reviews.review_text: It's secure, I believe, with very strict rules and regulations. The network can be very poor. The computer systems are old and not in great condition; not every department has ACs (my department also doesn't). Food quality is average in the hostel; I've stayed there occasionally for events and stuff, so I know.

reviews.review_heading: Join if you want to be disciplined.
reviews.review_text: As compared to other colleges in our district, it’s quite good, but I can’t say it’s the best. There are a number of issues with the server or website they use. Even in infrastructure, the campus isn’t big enough. Also, the sports arena, when it comes to football, is small.

reviews.review_heading: It has excellent academics, strong placements, and a vibrant campus.
reviews.review_text: Labs for the CSE course are well-equipped, and classrooms are decent. Hostels provide the basic necessities and are kept clean. The mess food is average and can get monotonous. Wi-Fi connectivity in the hostel blocks can be unreliable at times.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review that will help us decide on our future college.
reviews.review_text: SRMS has a good infrastructure. It has a clean campus with a lot of trees and greenery. It has highly cleaned washrooms. Good classrooms are equipped with AC. It has its own dairy and mess. It doesn't use any onions or garlic in the mess food. The mess food quality is okay.

reviews.review_heading: It has great seniors and average placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is big with a great infrastructure. But it is all white. It feels boring. Classrooms have projectors and blackboards. The canteen is average. A dispensary is also available there. Sports, games, and everything is available there. The library is available, which is free. Food is average in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: The placements are not at all satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is outdated. One of the most disappointing aspects of my college experience has been the severely lacking infrastructure. While the institution markets itself as modern and very cute, the reality is completely different. Basic facilities like functioning projectors, reliable internet, and proper computing software are either unavailable or poorly maintained.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Molecular Medicine - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Yes, go for this college it's so good.

review_content.Placements: At Amrita Vidyapeeth, the placement is 95%. This college is comparable to IITS, NITS, and DTU. This was one of the best colleges in Kerala last year; the highest package goes to INR 35 lacs. And that, with its branch and the lowest package, was INR 18 lacs, so the average package here is around INR 15 lacs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The course is amazing. You will have to work mostly in the laboratory on several projects. You have to make so much analysis that there will be 40 experiments in total. So you have to work a lot for the exam. The overall infrastructure of the college is so good. You have so many things to learn. As classes goes on virtually also.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. with Research in Molecular Medicine - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Best lifescience and Nanotech research in India.

review_content.Placements: I have not graduated yet, so no one in my batch has been placed. We had an industrial visit to Merck Life Sciences where they asked students to submit their CVs. They also assured us that they would bring in recruiters from companies if we are interested in securing a job after our degree. The placement cell is very dedicated and sends us details of internship and placement opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The ASNSMM R&D facility is within the Amrita Hospital, which makes it even more convenient to receive patient samples for research. Our department has state-of-the-art facilities for Medical and Nano Research. Free Wi-Fi, clean washrooms, and water dispensers are available in classrooms and on the research floor. Classrooms are equipped with projectors, screens for projectors, speakers, microphones, and separate whiteboards. Each class can accommodate more than 100 students. Hostel facilities are available separately for boys and girls. Each hostel room can accommodate three students and is assigned according to roll number, but we are free to rearrange later. Free Wi-Fi, clean bathrooms, and five washing machines are available in undergraduate hostels. Other amenities like a coffee shop (open until 11 PM), gym, and top-notch medical facilities are also available since the hostel is located inside the hospital compound. Medical services are provided 24/7.

content.Placements: I have not graduated yet, so no one in my batch has been placed. We had an industrial visit to Merck Life Sciences where they asked students to submit their CVs. They also assured us that they would bring in recruiters from companies if we are interested in securing a job after our degree. The placement cell is very dedicated and sends us details of internship and placement opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The ASNSMM R&D facility is within the Amrita Hospital, which makes it even more convenient to receive patient samples for research. Our department has state-of-the-art facilities for Medical and Nano Research. Free Wi-Fi, clean washrooms, and water dispensers are available in classrooms and on the research floor. Classrooms are equipped with projectors, screens for projectors, speakers, microphones, and separate whiteboards. Each class can accommodate more than 100 students. Hostel facilities are available separately for boys and girls. Each hostel room can accommodate three students and is assigned according to roll number, but we are free to rearrange later. Free Wi-Fi, clean bathrooms, and five washing machines are available in undergraduate hostels. Other amenities like a coffee shop (open until 11 PM), gym, and top-notch medical facilities are also available since the hostel is located inside the hospital compound. Medical services are provided 24/7.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, IIT Patna ranks #36 under the category Overall, #19 under Engineering, and #39 under Research Institutions.

IIT Patna admissions 2026 are open for various programmes. Check below few more updates related to IITP admissions:

The GATE 2026 exam for admission to ME/MTech and PhD courses has concluded. Results are scheduled for release on Mar 19, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: - 10 by India Today 2025 (Engineering) - 19 by NIRF 2025 (BTech) - 159 by QS Ranking 2026 (Asian University Rankings - Southern Asia)

college_info.intro:
IIT Patna popular programmes are BTech and MTech. BTech and MTech students are placed in top companies such as Oracle, Bosch, and TVS. IIT Patna Engineering department focuses on cutting-edge research in areas of Computer Science such as the Internet of Things, Cloud, Edge, Generative Artificial Intelligence (Gen AI), Machine Learning, Blockchain Technology, Mobile Computing, Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAV) Networking, Social Networks, and others.
The departments are Computer Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Chemical and Biochemical Engineering, Civil and Environmental Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Chemistry, Physics, Mathematics and Humanities, and Social Science.
IIT Patna MTech course students will be able to Understand fundamental concepts of Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Big Data, Speech Processing, Robotics, Cloud Computing, Computer Vision, Natural Language Processing, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by IIT Patna and their respective eligibility and IIT Patna MBA fees and IIT Patna course fee:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: IIT Patna courses include various undergraduate, postgraduate, and PhD courses. At the UG level, IIT Patna offers a four-year BTech course to students in 11 specialisations. BTech is the flagship course of IIT Patna. IIT Patna MBA is also a sought-after course that is opted for by Management students. At the PG level, IIT Patna offers a two-year MTech course and a two-year MSc course to students. IIT Patna also offers PhD courses to students.

faqs.answer: A:    The total fee for BTceh at IIT Patna is INR 8 lakh.  For more clairity  students are advised to reach out to the admission office of IIT Patna or visit the admission office in person.
faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at IIT Patna?

faqs.answer: A:    No, there is no provision of a student studying free at IIT Patna as per the official website. However, IIT Patna provides a range of Merit-Cum-Means scholarships to meritorious and needy students. Any UG (BTech) student or MSc student can receive these scholarships. The criteria to receive is that the annual income of a student's parents/ guardian/ family from all sources in the preceding financial year must not be more than INR 4.50 lakh. Category-wise eligibility criteria and the way in which the scholarship is offered is as follows:CategoryScholarship EligibilityScholarship ProvidedGen & OBC studentsFor new entrants: Their SPI will be the criteria for merit + Minimum SPI is 6.50 and no "F" grade in any of the courses in the first semester + Annual Family income must be less than INR 4.5 lakh For 2nd-year students (BTech/MSc): Minimum CPI is 6.50 and no "F" gradeINR 1,000 per month is provided for two semesters along with a full tuition fee waiverSC and ST studentsFor new entrants: Their SPI will be the criteria for merit + No "F" grade in any of the courses in the first semester + Annual Family income must be less than INR 4.5 lakh For 2nd-year students (BTech/MSc): No "F" grade in any of the coursesFree mess, exemption from hostel room rent and pocket allowance of INR 250 per monthA few more PG scholarships and UG scholarships offered by the PM are awarded to the students of IIT Patna.
faqs.question: Can I study BTech at IIT Patna for free?

faqs.answer: A:    IIT Patna accepts CUET score for the BSc programme. To get admission to the BSc programme at IIT Patna the aspiring candidates need to have a minimum of 60% in class 12. They also need National/State Level Entrance (i.e., JEE (Advanced/Main), NEET, CUET, BITSAT, KVPY/NTSE/INSPIRE scholarship holders, State Entrance Examinations).
faqs.question: Does IIT Patna accept CUET score?

faqs.answer: A:    IIT Patna accepts multiple state/national entrance exams other than JEE advance for admission to BSc courses. NEET, CUET, BITSAT, etc.,  are other exams accepted by the institute. However, candidates must make sure to first qualify for the BSc eligibility criteria. Qualified candidates just need to apply via the official website of IIT Patna. BSc eligibility criteria: Class 12 in Science Stream with 60% aggregateTherefore, even if a student doesn't have a JEE Advanced score, they can always go for other entrance exam for admission. Howvever, candidates must make sure to qualify for any one of the entrance exam mentioned, in order to get admission to the BSc cousre at IIT Patna.
faqs.question: Can I join IIT Patna BSc course if I don't have JEE Advance?

reviews_list.review_title: If you want to explore and have fun than its better to choose any old IITs.

review_content.Placements: Placement is pretty good almost all good companies come to college especially FAANG and over 90 percent got placed in CSE. The average package of my branch is about 24 LPA and last year, the highest package is about 80 LPA, while at the college, the highest package is about 1.3cr, which is given to a student of the AIDS branch.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are good but the instruments are old. Wi-Fi is available everywhere, including the hostel, academic building and lecture hall. The library is good and big but during exam time, it has a shortage of seats as all the students come and study overnight. There are not as many canteens and food stalls in comparison to old IITs that is a big problem and also Blinkit , Instamart, Zepto is not available only Jio smart is available but that not sufficient.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: IIT Patna M.Tech honest college review.

review_content.Placements: Placements at the institute are the perfect definition of it. Students generally become eligible for placement from the fourth semester. Around 300 recruiters participate, including top domestic as well as foreign companies. The average package for the M.Tech programme is 16 LPA, and the highest package offered is 1 CPA. The top recruiters in the drive include Microsoft, Oracle, Goldman Sachs, ICICI, Tata, and HCL. Almost 100 percent of students got placed. I plan to work after my graduation.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel rooms are good in all aspects. 24 hour electricity is provided, and an emergency generator facility is available. The hostel is neat and clean. Sweepers come regularly to clean the dirty areas, and rooms are properly cleaned every weekend. The mess maintains good quality food.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Material Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: IIT Patna college honest review.

content.Placements: The placement in our college was very good as it was one of the top engineering colleges of India. The placement percentage was around 80 percent. The highest package offered in our course was 24 LPA. Top recruiters in our course were Larsen and Turbo, Vedanta LTD, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure were top-notch for the Metallurgical and Materials Engineering branch. Wi-Fi facility, modern labs, and central library were present in the college campus. Hostel facility was also good. Washrooms were clean, fresh water was available, and a sports complex was present.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college. IIT Patna is a rapidly growing 2nd generation IIT..

content.Placements: Placements are good and are still ongoing. The data for this year is not out yet, but it is said that in my course, 70% of students are placed. Many got internships in the 3rd year and PPOs from that. EEE has an average package of 17 LPA. Roles like SDE and Consultancy are offered, with placements rapidly improving year by year.
content.Infrastructure: All hostels have Wi-Fi installed. Three students share one room in the 1st year boys’ hostel. The newly built library is now open and centrally located. Labs and workshops are well-equipped with all necessary equipment. CLH is amazing with big classrooms. Each department has its own building where research and practical work take place.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: If you want to explore and have fun than its better to choose any old IITs.

content.Placements: Placement is pretty good almost all good companies come to college especially FAANG and over 90 percent got placed in CSE. The average package of my branch is about 24 LPA and last year, the highest package is about 80 LPA, while at the college, the highest package is about 1.3cr, which is given to a student of the AIDS branch.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are good but the instruments are old. Wi-Fi is available everywhere, including the hostel, academic building and lecture hall. The library is good and big but during exam time, it has a shortage of seats as all the students come and study overnight. There are not as many canteens and food stalls in comparison to old IITs that is a big problem and also Blinkit , Instamart, Zepto is not available only Jio smart is available but that not sufficient.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: IIT Patna M.Tech honest college review.

content.Placements: Placements at the institute are the perfect definition of it. Students generally become eligible for placement from the fourth semester. Around 300 recruiters participate, including top domestic as well as foreign companies. The average package for the M.Tech programme is 16 LPA, and the highest package offered is 1 CPA. The top recruiters in the drive include Microsoft, Oracle, Goldman Sachs, ICICI, Tata, and HCL. Almost 100 percent of students got placed. I plan to work after my graduation.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel rooms are good in all aspects. 24 hour electricity is provided, and an emergency generator facility is available. The hostel is neat and clean. Sweepers come regularly to clean the dirty areas, and rooms are properly cleaned every weekend. The mess maintains good quality food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a really good college with great campus life and good placements.

content.Placements: Around 80 percent of total registered students get placed in the Metallurgical and Materials Engineering branch. The highest package is 51 LPA, the average is around 15 LPA, and the lowest is 10 LPA. Top companies are Google, Microsoft, and Facebook. Around 60 percent of students get internships. The top roles are software engineer and consultant.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are top-notch for Metallurgical and Materials Engineering at IIT Patna. There are almost all labs for every subject. The infrastructure for lectures and tutorials are top-notch. Hostel infrastructure is very clean and top-notch, and the mess is also good.

admission_overview.college_name: IIT Patna IIT Patna Admission 2026: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Selection

admission_overview.title: IIT Patna Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: IIT Patna admission 2026 is entrance-based. With large number of applications and limited seats, admissions are compeitive at IIT Patna. The institute offers admission to its flagship BTech programme based on JEE Main followed by JEE Advanced scores. The seats are allotted in BTech course via JoSAA Counselling. IIT Patna also offers BS, MSc, MTech and other courses. While admission to MTech and MSc is subject to GATE and IIT JAM, respectively, the admission process for BS is subject to a valid score in JEE Main, JEE Advanced, followed by JoSAA counselling.

eligibility_selection.title: IIT Patna Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: The admission cycle for BTech programmes usually commences in December with JEE Main registrations. IIT Patna offers a range of UG, PG, and doctoral courses in Engineering, Management and Science, among others. Admission to the courses is based on entrance exam scores of the candidates. Check below the eligibility and selection criteria for IIT Patna courses: Class 12 with 75% aggregate

faqs.answer: Candidates must complete Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics with a minimum of 75% aggregate to apply for BTech programme at IIT Patna. Aspirants also need to pass JEE Main followed by JEE Advanced to get a seat in the BTech course.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for BTech at IIT Patna?

faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass IIT JAM with a good rank to get a seat in the MSc programme of IIT Patna. The seats are offered in the MSc programme via CCMN Counselling. The IIT JAM cutoff is quite competitive for MSc admission at IIT Patna. The closing rank was between 575-699 for MSc in 2025.
faqs.question: Can I get admission in MSc programme at IIT Patna without IIT JAM score?

faqs.answer: The total fee for BTceh at IIT Patna is INR 8 lakh.  For more clairity  students are advised to reach out to the admission office of IIT Patna or visit the admission office in person.

admission_process.title: IIT Patna Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: IIT Patna has a multi-step admission process which students need to follow to get into the institute. Candidates are required to go through the course-specific entrance exam, followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After the selection rounds are over, students need to go through the exam-specific counselling process for final seat allotment. A step-by-step process of admission is as follows:
Step 1: IIT Patna Application Process 2026
Students interested in getting into IIT Patna must submit the online application form for the course-specific entrance exam or college, depending on the course they wish to get into.
Step 2: IIT Patna University Selection Criteria 2026 & Release of Merit List

After submission of the applications, applicants are required to go through the course-based entrance exam, followed by other selection rounds (if applicable). After the selection rounds are completed, they are required to go through the course-wise counselling process for final seat allocation.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation at IIT Patna
After completion of the selection rounds, students who are shortlisted can submit the admission fees and confirm their admission to the relevant course at IIT Patna.

IIT Patna fee is cumulative of multiple components such as tuition fee, hostel fee, library deposit, training and placement fee, etc. However, to collect the fee, the institute might follow various procedures, terms and conditions. The total tuition fee forBSc, andBBAis INR 2.40 lakh, respectively. at IIT Patna. Some of the fee components are charged one-time, while some have to be paid semester-wise or annually, such as tuition fees. The fee amount further varies depending upon the chosen course or specialisation. The following sections mention the IIT Patna admission fee breakup for the offered courses.
Check the completeIIT Patna fee structure

courses_data.description: IIT Patna offers BTech for four-years at the UG level. The course is divided into eight semesters. BTech is the flagship programme of IIT Patna, admission to which is based on JEE Advanced scores followed by JoSAA Counselling. The institute offers BTech in Computer Science, Chemical, Mechanical, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, Civil Engineering, etc. Candidates who have completed Class 12 with PCM with at least 75% aggregate can apply for BTech.

faqs.question: Can I study BTech at IIT Patna for free?
faqs.answer: No, there is no provision of a student studying free at IIT Patna as per the official website. However, IIT Patna provides a range of Merit-Cum-Means scholarships to meritorious and needy students. Any UG (BTech) student or MSc student can receive these scholarships. The criteria to receive is that the annual income of a student's parents/ guardian/ family from all sources in the preceding financial year must not be more than INR 4.50 lakh. Category-wise eligibility criteria and the way in which

faqs.question: Can I change my BTech branch after admission to IIT Patna?
faqs.answer: In general, students admitted to the particular branch of the undergraduate BTech course must continue studying that branch till completion. However, in special cases the institute may permit a student admitted through JEE to change their branch of study after the first two semesters. Such changes are permitted only for students who have completed all the common credits required in the first two semesters of their studies, in their first attempt, without having had to pass any course requirement

faqs.question: What rank is required for BTech CSE at IIT Patna?
faqs.answer: Candidates are offered seat in IIT Patna BTech CSE programme based on their JEE Advanced rank. Looking at the past three-year closing rank, the cutoffs has a declining trend. The closing rank was 2811 in 2023,  3144 in 2024 and 3377 in 2025.

faqs.question: What is fee for various courses offered at IIT Patna?
faqs.answer: IIT Patna offers various Undergraduate, Postgraduate, and PhD courses in Engineering and Technology, Science, and Humanities and Social Science. courses_data.description: IIT Patna offers MTech for two-years at the PG level. This course is divided into four semesters. The institute offers MTech in.Artificial Intelligence,Power and Control,Structural Engineering, Geotechnical Engineering,Civil Engineering, etc. Admission to MTech programme is based on GATE followed by COAP Counselling. Candidates who have completed graduation can apply for MTech.

faqs.question: Can I get into IIT Patna for M.Tech without GATE?
faqs.answer: Candidates who wish to apply to the M.Tech programme must have a valid GATE score. Students are screened based on their CGPI in BE/BTech and GATE scores during COAP counselling. However, candidates who have completed their BTech from IITs with a CGPA of 8.0 and above can apply without GATE scores. These applications are reviewed by the respective department (s). Hence, the answer to this question is -yes, it is possible to get into IIT Patna without GATE for MTech.

faqs.question: What all M.Tech specialisations are available at IIT Patna?
faqs.answer: IIT Patna offers MTech for two-years at the PG level. The course is divided into four semesters. Check below the MTech specialisations offered at the institute:Environmental EngineeringArtificial IntelligenceChemical EngineeringTransportation EngineeringMathematics & Computing, etc.

faqs.question: Does IIT Patna accept CUET score?
faqs.answer: IIT Patna accepts CUET score for the BSc programme. To get admission to the BSc programme at IIT Patna the aspiring candidates need to have a minimum of 60% in class 12. They also need National/State Level Entrance (i.e., JEE (Advanced/Main), NEET, CUET, BITSAT, KVPY/NTSE/INSPIRE scholarship holders, State Entrance Examinations).

faqs.question: How can I join IIT Patna?
faqs.answer: BTech and BS courses completely based on JoSAA following an appearance by a candidate for JEE Main and JEE Advanced examination, however for other courses MSc and M.Tech based on GATE, IIT JAM through COAP and CCMN counselling and the seats under PhD course on appearance basis on admission test organized by institute itself. After the test is conducted, IIT Patna publishes a merit list containing the names of students selected for PhD.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at IIT Patna?
faqs.answer: IIT Patna admissions to the courses are conducted on the basis of entrance exam scores of the candidates. The institute accepts several entrance exam scores for admission such as JEE Main, JEE Advanced,  GATE, JMET,  CAT, XAT,  MAT, ATMA, etc.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in IIT Patna?
faqs.answer: No, direct admission is not available at IIT Patna. It's purely on the basis of candidates' performances in JEE Advanced and JEE Main. For postgraduate, it may be either on the basis of their GATE scores or by entrance examinations conducted by respective courses.

placement_data.title: IIT Patna Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: As per media reports, IIT Patna placement process 2026 is ongoing and will continue till May 2026. As of now, the overall highest package recorded during the placement drive 2025-26 was INR 117 LPA . BTech and MTech average package recorded was INR 25.82 LPA and INR 16.2 LPA . BTech and MTech average package increased by 17.66% and 7.32% this year as compared with 2024-25.
Top recruiters during IIT Patna placements 2025-26 included Google, BEL, BPCL, Samsung , Optum, L&T, Microsoft, Reliance, CISCO and Goldman Sachs.

faqs.question: What is the placement rate at IIT Patna?
faqs.answer: IIT Patna placement 2026 is ongoing and will continue till May 2026. At the end of Phase 1 placement 2025-26, BTech placement rate was 54.34%. Earlier, the placement rate at IIT Patna stood at 77.92% and 61.01% for BTech and MTech during placements 2024.

faqs.question: What is the salary package offered during IIT Patna placements?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered during IIT Patna placements 2026 was INR 117 LPA. During the placement drive 2024, it was INR 144 LPA. BTech and MTech average package at the end of Phase 1 placement 2025-26 was INR 25.82 LPA and 16.2 LPA. Earlier, as per the placement brochure 2024-25, the average package offered during IIT Patna placements 2024 for BTech, M.Tech and MSc programs stood at around INR 17 LPA, INR 15 LPA and INR 7 LPA, respectively. The course-wise average package offered over the past three years during IIT Patna placements is presented below: Course Average Package (2021) Average Package (2022) Average Package (2023) BTech INR 17.13 LPA INR 28.86 LPA INR 24.56 LPA MTech INR 12.22 LPA INR 14.99 LPA INR 15.77 LPA MSc INR 6.97 LPA INR 6.86 LPA INR 9.22 LPA

faqs.question: How many companies visit the campus during IIT Patna placements?
faqs.answer: A total of 90 companies visited the campus and 319 offers were made at the end of IIT Patna Phase 1 placements 2025-26. Earlier, 225 companies visited and 582 offers were made during the placement drive 2024-25.

description: IIT Patna cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to BTech, MSc, MTech, and other courses. Students can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIT Patna JEE Advanced cutoff 2025, along with other exams for different courses, rounds, categories, etc. Further details regarding the latest exam events are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last nine years of IIT Patna JEE Advanced cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIT Patna cutoff 2026 is expected to be released tentatively in the month of June 2026. In the meantime, candidates preparing for JEE Advanced can refer to the table below to view the cutoff ranks for the last year's first and last rounds for admission to B.Tech. and other courses. During the IIT Patna JEE Advanced cutoff 2025 in the last round, the highest cutoff rank reached 16815 under the B.E. / B.Tech course for the General AI category students. With a lowest last round cutoff rank of 3377,

IIT Patna B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 3377 and 16815, wherein the most sought-after specialisation for admission was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering with the lowest JEE Advanced cutoff rank. On the contrary, the easy-to-grab specialisation was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering + MBA in Digital Business Management (IIM Bodh Gaya), followed by B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, with lenient JEE Advanced cutoff ranks of 4297 and 4312, respectivel

JEE Advanced is the accepted exam for admission to the Engineering course, followed by the JoSAA counselling process for all the IITs, including IIT Patna. Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view all the important JEE Advanced 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling was conducted in multiple rounds for admission to the IITs, NITs, IIITs, and GFTIs. Candidates with a valid JEE Advanced 2025 score can participate in JoSAA for BTech admission at IITs. Conducted by the Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA), in 2025, a total of six seat allotment rounds were released for admission. Aspirants preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated round and year-wise JEE Advanced cutoff lists for IIT Patna to

The JEE Advanced 2025 cutoff was announced for admission to the BTech and other courses. Here, candidates can do a comparative analysis to view the specialisations available at other IITs for admission. The comparison is provided based on the JEE Advanced last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students.

IIT Patna JAM cutoff 2026 for M.Sc. admission has yet to be released. In the meantime, candidates can refer to the table below to view last year's cutoff data and estimate the upcoming cutoff. The IIT JAM 2025 cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks across categories under the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the last round of the IIT Patna M.Sc. cutoff 2025 ranged from 575 to 684, with M.Sc. in Mathematics being the most competitive for admission. In the first round, the closing ran

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, IIT Patna outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. IIT Patna's rankings in 'Overall' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, IIT Patna climbed 37 ranks to #36 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Engineering' category have shown an increasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, IIT Patna climbed 15 ranks to #19 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

qs_world.description:
IIT Patna has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, IIT Patna fell 36 ranks to #577 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, IIT Patna climbed 1 rank to #159 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

hostel.description: IIT Patna currently has one boys' hostel and one temporary girls' hostel in the campus. It also has necessary arrangements for married research scholars. Presently over 1200 students are residing in the hostels. Regular bus services have been provided from the hostels. The hostel also has a Wi-Fi facility along with gymnasium, TV room and table tennis.

library.description: IIIT Patna digital library is equipped with modern technology of library automation system with Online Public Access Catalogue (OPAC) and self check-in and shelf check-out (Drop Box) system using RFID technology. The library provides e-resources (e-books, e-journal, e-databases and Turnitin) facility, newspapers, etc.

reviews.review_heading: IIT Patna college honest review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure were top-notch for the Metallurgical and Materials Engineering branch. Wi-Fi facility, modern labs, and central library were present in the college campus. Hostel facility was also good. Washrooms were clean, fresh water was available, and a sports complex was present.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college. IIT Patna is a rapidly growing 2nd generation IIT..
reviews.review_text: All hostels have Wi-Fi installed. Three students share one room in the 1st year boys’ hostel. The newly built library is now open and centrally located. Labs and workshops are well-equipped with all necessary equipment. CLH is amazing with big classrooms. Each department has its own building where research and practical work take place.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to explore and have fun than its better to choose any old IITs.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good but the instruments are old. Wi-Fi is available everywhere, including the hostel, academic building and lecture hall. The library is good and big but during exam time, it has a shortage of seats as all the students come and study overnight. There are not as many canteens and food stalls in comparison to old IITs that is a big problem and also Blinkit , Instamart, Zepto is not available only Jio smart is available but that not sufficient.

reviews.review_heading: IIT Patna M.Tech honest college review.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are good in all aspects. 24 hour electricity is provided, and an emergency generator facility is available. The hostel is neat and clean. Sweepers come regularly to clean the dirty areas, and rooms are properly cleaned every weekend. The mess maintains good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: It is a really good college with great campus life and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are top-notch for Metallurgical and Materials Engineering at IIT Patna. There are almost all labs for every subject. The infrastructure for lectures and tutorials are top-notch. Hostel infrastructure is very clean and top-notch, and the mess is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied (worth it).
reviews.review_text: There are separate buildings/floors for different departments, and they have Wi-Fi in all, afaik. Labs are well-equipped and maintained properly. IIT Patna has a central library, which is very beautiful and the heart of the campus; it is a round-shaped building with many floors and Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are well-furnished, and Wi-Fi is available. There are many hostels, but the hostel allotted to freshers is CV Raman. It is well-furnished, and Wi-Fi is available. Mess food is decent. There ...

reviews.review_heading: Strong academic program with knowledgeable faculty.
reviews.review_text: IIT Patna offers comprehensive facilities including modern academic blocks, extensive land with advanced equipment, a well -stocked digital /physical library, a dedicated hostel with Wi-Fi, a hospital/wellness centre, and robust sports amenities. Food safety involves mandatory hygiene rules, outsourced catering with quality check, menu adjustment feedback, and a Jain food option.

reviews.review_heading: Comparing IIT Patna with other IITs.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good if I compare it with other colleges, many IITs have average or just the worst hostel, but here the infrastructure is good, the buildings are new. Mess is also good, but not that good, you can't expect so much from them. Some lifts are not working all the time in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: A day as IIT Patna B.Sc. student.
reviews.review_text: As we have campus immersion every 6 months for 10-15 days, we have the best facilities, hostel, mess, complete access to library, classrooms, gymkhana, and everything. We have a daily workshop in our college in which a teacher comes to guide us for our future.

reviews.review_heading: My review of the IIT Patna.
reviews.review_text: In the friendships structure, it is good for other IITs. It has 516 students and a big campus, but BS students cannot get hostel facilities. If you want hostel facilities, you can contact the IIT administration, who can allot you a hostel with all facilities like a gym and a khana.

reviews.review_heading: My college looks like heaven.
reviews.review_text: IIT Patna College's infrastructure is amazing, it looks like heaven. They have a big library, a big auditorium, and a garden area of 250 acres. The college looks like an angel. I love it, I like it, everything is amazing. Hostel infrastructure is good, mind-blowing, they have girls' and boys' separate hostel rooms.

reviews.review_heading: College is very good with the IIT tag.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Hostels are also good and well-maintained. The mess food is above average and not so good. We would not feel bad on campus because there are so many sports to play, indoors or outdoors, and of course, I must say that it's not enough.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities available for our course are very good. The classrooms and labs are modified and well-maintained. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is average. The hostel rooms are comfortable and clean. Multiple sports and medical facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is clean and peaceful. Faculty members are helpful. Placement ratio is too good.
reviews.review_text: IIT Patna is located on its permanent campus in Bihta. It has a well-developed infrastructure for both academic pursuits and student residential life. The institute has a central lecture hall and a tutorial building. Each department has well-equipped and fully functioning research and teaching laboratories.

reviews.review_heading: I'm absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is well-planned and developed. The whole campus is covered with Wi-Fi, and the classrooms have smart boards. The labs are updated with the latest technology, computers, and have an Apple lab. The food available in the mess and canteen is freshly prepared and delivered with proper packaging. The campus also has medical facilities and organizes an annual sports meet.

paragraphs: IIT Patna scholarships vary from merit-based to need-based. IIT Patna offers scholarships at the institute level for BTech and MTech students. Students can also apply for central/ state government scholarships as per their eligibility. The various IIT Patna scholarships are as follows:
Institution Scheme Scholarship: IIT Patna offers merit-cum-means scholarships to undergraduate and MSc students, as tabulated below:
Eligibility for merit-based
For BTech/MSc 1st year: Minimum SPI of 6.50 and no ‘F’ grade
For BTech/MSc 2nd year onwards: Minimum CPI of 6.50 and no ‘F’ grade in any of the courses
For BTech/MSc 1st year: no ‘F’ grade
For BTech/MSc 2nd year onwards: no ‘F’ grade in any of the courses
Eligibility for means based
Annual family income should not be more than INR 4.5 LPA
Annual family income should not be more than INR 4.5 LPA
Scholarship Rate
-Pocket allowance of INR 1,000 per month
-Free tuition fee
-Pocket allowance of INR 250 per month
-Free mess charges and hostel room rent

Central Scheme Scholarships: There are numerous scholarships offered by the central/state government. Students can apply for any one of the below-mentioned scholarships by applying through the National Scholarship Portal.

individual_reviews.title: Best faculty, college environment and campus.

content.Placements: You can join the college as Junior Resident and Senior Resident through interviews. There is yet no batch passed from MBBS because the college was established in 2017. You can also join as faculty through interviews. Also join as medical officer though exam which held every year.
content.Infrastructure: We don't have a wi-fi facility. College class are well furnished. In library have a lot of books and is well furnished and air-conditioned. Hostel Food is good but tastes not good. And a separate sports complex is also there. There is a guest house also where your parents can stay when they come to meet you.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students are placed in the internship and training programme. There is no highest or lowest package in MBBS as it’s a government college. The top recruiting hospital is AIMS Raipur, and 90 percent of students got internships from various government hospitals. The top role is of assistant doctor.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good as the college is new and still under construction. Wi-Fi isn’t that good. Labs and classrooms are good. The library is decent. Hostel quality is very good, with occupancy of 2 persons per room and individual beds. The mess is newly opened, and food is very good.

description: Chhindwara Institute of Medical Sciences cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Chhindwara Institute of Medical Sciences NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 18301 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Chhindwara Institute of Medical Sciences MBBS cutoff 2025 was 18301 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 19351 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Chhindwara Institute of Medical Sciences accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Chhindwara Institute of Medical Sciences NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 67970 to 176691. According to this range, the most and least competitive courses are MD and MS, respectively. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Chhindwara Institute of Medical Sciences MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Pathology, followed by MD in Pharmacology and MD in Biochemistry. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 67970, 124018 and 137703, respectively.

Chhindwara Institute of Medical Sciences MD cutoff 2025 was released across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for different categories under the Home State quota. As per the Round 2 cutoff data, the top two most competitive MD specialisations for admission were MD in Anaesthesiology and MD in Forensic Medicine andtoxicology, with MP NEET PG cutoff ranks of 27397 and 35864, respectively.

hostel_campus.college_name: Chhindwara Institute of Medical Sciences Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty, college environment and campus.
reviews.review_text: We don't have a wi-fi facility. College class are well furnished. In library have a lot of books and is well furnished and air-conditioned. Hostel Food is good but tastes not good. And a separate sports complex is also there. There is a guest house also where your parents can stay when they come to meet you.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is very good, and students receive excellent training.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good as the college is new and still under construction. Wi-Fi isn’t that good. Labs and classrooms are good. The library is decent. Hostel quality is very good, with occupancy of 2 persons per room and individual beds. The mess is newly opened, and food is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with academics and college Basic infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Better than other medical institute in Madhya Pradesh. Faculty and hostel facilities are awesome. Ragging free campus. Hostel have single, double occupancy rooms. Attached rooms also available for final year students. Hostels are totally clean, no problem for light and water, .

reviews.review_heading: Best college of district.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and almost facilities is available in the college. The college is awesome for medical students. Ofcourse there is a big lab and the library with all important books and the classrooms where can easily arrange then 100 of students at a time.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure with great career opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are excellent. Hostels are very good. The food served in the mess is better. The food price is Rs 3,000 per month. Separate hostels are available for both boys and girls. The reading room is available 24X7.

highlights.summary: The CAT 2026 registration is expected to start in the Aug, 2026 for admission to the MBA course.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Himalayiya University offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and M.Com. Himalayiya University courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Himalayiya University courses stands around INR 4,000 to 5,52,500.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Aviation - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and faculty.

review_content.Placements: Most of the people don't know about aviation. But aviation is also a good opportunity for people to make a standard of living. Top recruiting companies are Indigo, Air India, Akasa Air, etc. The most famous role is cabin crew, which offers a good package as well as many privileges. In B.V., the internship is done every 3 months but for B.B.A. in aviation, there aren't many internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: I haven't lived in that hostel but the hostel and mess are good. The canteen system and food are a little bit hasty but it's fine either way. As for medical facilities, they're way too good, as they have their own hospital on campus and they also have a big playground for games.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Aviation - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is fine except for the transportation facility. Placements are very reliable.

review_content.Infrastructure: The course infrastructure is good and systematic, whereas hostel facilities are also good but can be much better. The food is fine. If the cook is replaced with someone else, the food can have a much better taste. Hostel rooms are spacious and shared.
review_content.Faculty: Exams are not that hard. Faculty members help students and are very approachable and supportive. Exams are conducted with strict supervision. So no one can cheat, but the staff help students if they are unable to understand a question or call the subject teacher for queries. My course is BBA in Aviation and Hospitality. The knowledge I have gained is extensive about the aviation and hotel industry. In my batch, there are 13 students, and we all spend time together. Teachers are very nice. There are also medical students who help the juniors in need.

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

answer.text: A career in media industry requires commitment, dedication and sacrifice of personal time for the sake of staying on front or top, particularly in news industry. A journalist may have to work day in and day out to get breaking news. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & AH) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It has an excellent infrastructure and provides good lab facilities.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of students get placed in government or private jobs with satisfying salary packages. The most common jobs are veterinary assistant surgeons and jobs in Aavin, poultry industries, feed industries, pharmaceutical companies, etc. Many students are placed in union and state public service.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has well-equipped laboratories. It has five gallery-type lecture halls and a library with many books. There are separate grounds for cricket and football. There are facilities for volleyball, Kho-Kho, badminton, shuttle, and table tennis. Hostels available for boys and girls are congested. There are separate mess facilities. There is a teaching veterinary clinical complex to expose students to clinical cases.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & AH) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The course provided are good but, situated in rural area, you can get only limited facilities.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement within the campus. But there are many job opportunities outside. You can write government exams for veterinary assistance service after completing UG and if you clear it, you can get a government job at the age of 24. So you can take the course BVSC & AH wholeheartedly.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college and hostel both are good but the hostel maintenance is poor. The quality of the food is not so poor. Somedays, the food may not be good but most of the days, the food is good. Non-vegetarian food is provided every day. The mess charge is high around Rs.5000 per month.

review_summary.college_name: Veterinary College & Research Institute, Tirunelveli Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & AH) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the good library, teachers, and best practicals.

content.Placements: 75 percent of students are placed. 7 LPA is the highest package, 4 LPA is the lowest, and 5 LPA is the average package. Suguna, Venkatesh chicken, ambulance, dairy industries, Aavin, etc. are the top recruiters. 100 percent of students got internships. Doctors, clinicians, veterinarians, etc., are the top roles offered. In the internship, we got around an 11k stipend, which is less.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure with libraries around 10,000 books are available in our college library. The hostel was good with food and the mess bill is high due to extra but it is manageable. I like our hostel and the warden is good and friendly. He is a gem and Dean is the best.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & AH) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It has an excellent infrastructure and provides good lab facilities.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students get placed in government or private jobs with satisfying salary packages. The most common jobs are veterinary assistant surgeons and jobs in Aavin, poultry industries, feed industries, pharmaceutical companies, etc. Many students are placed in union and state public service.
content.Infrastructure: It has well-equipped laboratories. It has five gallery-type lecture halls and a library with many books. There are separate grounds for cricket and football. There are facilities for volleyball, Kho-Kho, badminton, shuttle, and table tennis. Hostels available for boys and girls are congested. There are separate mess facilities. There is a teaching veterinary clinical complex to expose students to clinical cases.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & AH) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The course provided are good but, situated in rural area, you can get only limited facilities.

content.Placements: There is no placement within the campus. But there are many job opportunities outside. You can write government exams for veterinary assistance service after completing UG and if you clear it, you can get a government job at the age of 24. So you can take the course BVSC & AH wholeheartedly.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college and hostel both are good but the hostel maintenance is poor. The quality of the food is not so poor. Somedays, the food may not be good but most of the days, the food is good. Non-vegetarian food is provided every day. The mess charge is high around Rs.5000 per month.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & AH) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of Veterinary College & Research Institute, Tirunelveli.

content.Placements: Around 80% of the students are placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 20 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 7 LPA. The average salary package offered is 12 LPA. Top recruitment companies for our course are poultry industries, bio-sys department, various NGOs, and dairy farms. Around 70% of the students got internships. Top roles are offered in dairy farms.
content.Infrastructure: There are separate departments for each subject and unit. Classrooms are also separated for each graduating year. There is a good ventilated library with various types of books available. About hostels, there are separate buildings for boys and girls, good toilets and bathrooms. In each room has 1 fan and two almeras for clothes, and personal things. For sports, all types of game grounds are provided.

The top courses offered at Sikkim Manipal University include BTech, BSc and MBA. Students can become Software Developers, AI Engineers, Data Scientits etc after doing the BTech in Computer Science and Engineering course from the Sikkim Manipal University. Students can also work in companies like Google, Microsoft, Dell, Wipro, Accenture.
The university also offers other degree courses and a Paramedical Diploma across 7 disciplines.
