fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sikkim Manipal University offers UG, PG, certificate, diploma, and doctoral level courses. The University offers respective courses with durations varying from 6 months to 5.5 years. Admission to these courses would be considered on the basis of entrance exams. Furthermore, the SMU Gangtok tuition fees vary from INR 44.7 K to INR 1.05 Cr. Candidates can check the Sikkim Manipal University courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    Sikkim Manipal University offers BSc in Medical Biotechnology as full-time bachelor's degree. To be eligible for BSc admission, students should have completed Class 12 or equivalent with 50% aggregate in PCB/Biotechnology.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for Sikkim Manipal University BSc in Medical Biotechnology?

faqs.answer: A:    Sikkim Manipal University Gangtok offers courses such as BTech at the UG level for 4 years on the basis of the minimum aggregate of 45% in Class 12 with PCM as a mandatory subject. Along with this, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main/ MET/ SMIT online test or equivalent. The University offers BTech in various specialisations with a total tuition fee ranging from INR 7.8 Lacs to INR 15.6 Lakh, one-time fees worth INR 5 K, and hostel fees ranging from INR 5.16 Lacs to INR 6.45 lakh. Candidates must visit the official website or enquire at the campus for better clarity.
faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at Sikkim Manipal University Gangtok?

faqs.answer: A:    Sikkim Manipal University conducts separate entrance tests, and Personal Interview (PI) rounds to evaluate the candidates. Candidates willing to apply for the BTech, MTech, and MCA must first apply for the University entrance test known as SMIT (Sikkim Manipal Institute of Technology). However, candidates with a valid JEE Main and GATE score can apply at the University's official website. For those who have qualified SMIT, JEE Main or MET, counselling will be conducted separately for seat allotment. The candidates will also have to select their preferred course. SMIT 2025 seat allotment will be done by the authorities based on the candidate's rank and other factors.
faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted by Sikkim Manipal University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can join Sikkim University with or without entrance exams. The University offers admission via an entrance exam and merit based on the candidate's performance in the qualifying exam. Merit-based admission is offered for courses such as BA, BSc, BCom, BCA, etc.  However, for the flagship course, BTech admission is based on either JEE Main or SMIT Entrance Exam.  Candidates only have to qualify for the eligibility criteria, and based on their performance in the qualifying exam, a merit list will be prepared.
faqs.question: Can I join Sikkim Manipal University without entrance?

reviews_list.review_title: The college is best. The campus area is clean and fresh with a nice environment.

review_content.Placements: 20 students are placed in my course. The highest salary is 2 lakhs per month and the lowest salary is Rs. 60,000 per month. Companies like Amazon and Microsoft hire students. About 20% of students get internships in Tata. Roles like accounting and business operators are offered. It helps students to get nice paid placements. Internships are done in a very proper manner where we can learn.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are awesome. All the needed things are present here. I would rate 8 out of 10 for the canteen. The food and everything is good. We are enjoying our college life. Classrooms are very nice with AC and Wi-Fi connectivity. The learning phase is going on, it has a good library where we can study.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Computer Science (AI and IoT) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: All-around campus with good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Currently B.Sc. Computer Science (specialized in AI and IoT) is a newly formed branch that comes under the electronics and communication department, and I am the first batch student of this course. Placement is not initiated as we are currently in the second year of this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and faculty are good. Many facilities are provided by the department as well as the college. We can do whatever project we want to perform, and our department supports our projects and needs. Wi-Fi quality is a bit disappointing on campus, almost everyone uses 5G in college because Jio 5G has very high internet speed on campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty .

review_content.Placements: The total percentage of students is 16%. The average package is 3 years. Stnm Hospital, Manipal Hospital, and Singtam Hospital. All 16% of students get internships at Manipal. Roles offered include Senior Lab Technician. There are endless opportunities after taking MLT. We can build our businesses or work in hospitals. It is overall a very good course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has well-developed labs with all the equipment. Proper hygiene and safety protocols are followed. Free Wi-Fi and a 9 AM to 9 PM library facility are provided to every student. The food in the mess is hygienic and tasty. Everyone interested in sports is also encouraged to participate in fests.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at Sikkim Manipal University Gangtok?
overview_faqs.answer: Sikkim Manipal University Gangtok offers courses such as BTech at the UG level for 4 years on the basis of the minimum aggregate of 45% in Class 12 with PCM as a mandatory subject. Along with this, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main/ MET/ SMIT online test or equivalent. The University offers BTech in various specialisations with a total tuition fee ranging from INR 7.8 Lacs to INR 15.6 Lakh, one-time fees worth INR 5 K, and hostel fees ranging from INR 5.16 Lacs to INR 6.45 lakh. Candidates must visit the official website or enquire at the campus for better clarity.

overview_faqs.question: Is Sikkim Manipal University a good university?
overview_faqs.answer: During Sikkim Manipal University placements 2022, a total of 567 UG and 65 PG students were placed according to the NIRF report. The university is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and is approved by the regulatory bodies such as Medical Council of India (MCI), Nursing Council of India, Indian Association of Physiotherapy, All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), and the Distance Education Council. Moreover, the university has also been ranked by multiple ranking bodies. The university has been ranked 13 by India today for ‘The best Medical Universities in India’ and ranked 8 by outlook for under ‘Top 10 Technical Universities’.

review_summary.college_name: Sikkim Manipal University Gangtok Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Review from a first year student.

content.Placements: 70-80 percent of students are placed from my course. The highest package is around 12 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA-3 LPA. Microsoft, Dell, Amazon, etc., are recruiting companies. 85-90 percent of students got internships with top recruiters like Accenture, Amazon, IBM, as software engineer, data analysts, and full-stack developers.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi-enabled smart classrooms, advanced labs, supported by a large library with centralised air-conditioners, 24/7 power backup, hostels with attached bathrooms, a health centre inside the campus, sports complex with pool, gym with multiple activities room.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, a worthy off-campus view, knowledgeable faculty members, and average placements

content.Placements: I am currently in my 5th semester of B.Tech (CSE), and the most recent pass-out 2025 batch are placed in reputed companies. In our 5th semester, recently a US healthcare company, Vivnovation, visited offering ₹15,000 per month as an intern role and a PPO of 22 LPA on satisfactory work performance. This year, the 2025 pass-out percentage of students placed stood at 76.5%, with 268 getting placed out of 350. The highest in-campus package offer is by Amazon, PwC, and Microsoft, which are 14 LPA, 12 LPA, and 8 LPA respectively. The roles are SAP Consultant and TS.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is best. The campus area is clean and fresh with a nice environment.

content.Placements: 20 students are placed in my course. The highest salary is 2 lakhs per month and the lowest salary is Rs. 60,000 per month. Companies like Amazon and Microsoft hire students. About 20% of students get internships in Tata. Roles like accounting and business operators are offered. It helps students to get nice paid placements. Internships are done in a very proper manner where we can learn.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are awesome. All the needed things are present here. I would rate 8 out of 10 for the canteen. The food and everything is good. We are enjoying our college life. Classrooms are very nice with AC and Wi-Fi connectivity. The learning phase is going on, it has a good library where we can study.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science (AI and IoT) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: All-around campus with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Currently B.Sc. Computer Science (specialized in AI and IoT) is a newly formed branch that comes under the electronics and communication department, and I am the first batch student of this course. Placement is not initiated as we are currently in the second year of this course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and faculty are good. Many facilities are provided by the department as well as the college. We can do whatever project we want to perform, and our department supports our projects and needs. Wi-Fi quality is a bit disappointing on campus, almost everyone uses 5G in college because Jio 5G has very high internet speed on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty .

content.Placements: The total percentage of students is 16%. The average package is 3 years. Stnm Hospital, Manipal Hospital, and Singtam Hospital. All 16% of students get internships at Manipal. Roles offered include Senior Lab Technician. There are endless opportunities after taking MLT. We can build our businesses or work in hospitals. It is overall a very good course.
content.Infrastructure: The college has well-developed labs with all the equipment. Proper hygiene and safety protocols are followed. Free Wi-Fi and a 9 AM to 9 PM library facility are provided to every student. The food in the mess is hygienic and tasty. Everyone interested in sports is also encouraged to participate in fests.

admission_overview.college_name: Sikkim Manipal University Gangtok Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_process.title: Sikkim Manipal University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sikkim Manipal University admission 2025 is open. Admission to the university is both merit and entrance-based. The university offers aParamedical diplomain seven disciplines. For admission to some courses, the university conducts separate entrance tests, and Personal Interview (PI) rounds to evaluate the candidates. In contrast, for others, the admission is purely based on the merit of the candidates. SMU also offers courses through its distance learning.

Sikkim Manipal University considers scores of its in-house entrance exams and another national-level entrance exam for the selection the eligible candidates. Interested candidates must fulfil the basic eligibility criteria and qualify for other selection rounds to secure a seat. Detailed information about the eligibility criteria and accepting the entrance exam regardingSikkim Manipal University coursesis given below:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria

SMIT Entrance Exam

Sikkim Manipal University offers a limited number of seats for its UG, PG, and doctoral courses The seats may vary according to the course and specialisations selected by the students. Find below theSikkim Manipal University seat intake:
Note:This information is collated from the official sources, and is subject to change.

Sikkim Manipal University accepts candidates either merit-based on the qualifying exam or via course-specific entrance exam. The university conducts its own entrance exam;SMIT Online Test, additionally, it also accepts national-level entrance exams. SMU has a multi-step admission process for admission to its programmes. Find below the completeSikkim Manipal University admission process:
Step 1: SMIT Entrance Exam
Appear for entrance exam as per course requiremets.
Step 2: SMU Application Process
Apply online at the official website.
Step 3: SMU Merit List

Sikkim Manipal University offers admission for a few of its courses via a merit list, which is prepared based on candidates' performance in the qualifying exams. The merit list is released on the University’s website.
Step 4: SMU Counselling

Candidates who are applying for courses under Sikkim Manipal Institute of Technology must register for theSMIT counselling 2025. For those who have qualified SMIT, JEE Main or MET, counselling will be conducted separately for seat allotment. The candidates will also have to select their preferred course. SMIT 2025 seat allotment will be done by the authorities based on the candidate's rank and other factors. A counseling letter will be sent to the successful candidate by e-mail.
Step 4: SMU Final Selection
SMU will make their final selection of candidates after the completion of the SMIT entrance exam, the University entrance exam, the release of the merit list, counselling, and finally fee payment.
Check out more on Sikkim Manipal University Admission in the below video:

It organizes training programs to enhance the aptitude and skill of students to increase employability. It also organizes events like seminars, workshops, guest lectures and corporate interactions.Sikkim Manipal University has concluded its placements for 2025. The highest and average package recorded during Sikkim Manipal University Gangtok placements 2025 was INR 54 LPA and INR 6.36 LPA, respectively. Additionally, 403 internship offers were provided by 57 companies. The highest stipend given to students was INR 1.20 lakhs which was given by Amazon. Recruiters like Google, Microsoft, Dell, Wipro, Accenture and others were a part of the Sikkim Manipal University placement season.

description: Sikkim Manipal University cutoff 2024 has been released for its BTech course. The university accepts the MET score for admission to the BE/BTech course. After the declaration of the result, the Sikkim Manipal University MET cutoff is prepared to shortlist the applicants for the admission process. The university also accepts national and state-level exam scores for admission to the various UG and PG programmes every year. Those seeking admission can scroll down to check the specialisation-wise, category-wise, and year-wise cutoff trends.

Sikkim Manipal University offers admission to different BTech courses based on MET scores followed by round-wise counselling. Candidates planning to be admitted to BTech at the University must have a valid score in the MET exam. Of all the specialisations, B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering can be considered the most popular and competitive specialisation because of the closing ranks. For the MET Round 1 Seat Allotment result, SMU cutoff 2023 stood at 35047 for the General catego

Sikkim Manipal University cutoff 2023 for BTech course is released up to Round 5 seat allotment. As per SMU cutoff 2023, B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering closed at 35047 for the General category All India candidates. In 2022, SMU cutoff stood at 32147 and in 2021 at 34161 for BTech EEE. On analysing the cutoffs, one can conclude that Sikkim Manipal University has witnessed a fluctuating trend. outlook.description:
According to the rankings from Outlook-ICARE, SMU outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. SMU's rankings in 'Arts' category have shown an increasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, SMU climbed 1 rank to #44 rank in the 'Arts' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'Commerce' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, SMU's rank is #45, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

hostel.description: The hostel provides a cot, mattress, study table, chair, book rack and wardrobe for each student. Every hostel has uninterrupted electricity, hot water facility during winter period, water cooler with Aquaguard filters, recreation hall, gymnasium and indoor games facilities

library.description:
The University has a well-equipped library with around 50137 books which caters to the needs of students and teachers. The university is the member of Developing Library Network (DELNET) Consortium which provides online access to leading libraries in the country. The University is also a member of INDEST- AICTE Consortium and thus has online access to most of the leading journals in the field of technology like IEEE, ASME, Elsevier (Science Direct), Digital Engineering, McGraw Hill E-Section, EBSCO (Management), ASTM.
Libraries are fully automated using EASYLIB –an advanced library automation system.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by SMIT - Sikkim Manipal Institute of Technology, Sikkim Manipal UniversityReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Review from a first year student.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi-enabled smart classrooms, advanced labs, supported by a large library with centralised air-conditioners, 24/7 power backup, hostels with attached bathrooms, a health centre inside the campus, sports complex with pool, gym with multiple activities room.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by SMIT - Sikkim Manipal Institute of Technology, Sikkim Manipal UniversityReviewed on 12 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, a worthy off-campus view, knowledgeable faculty members, and average placements
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are well-equipped with proper seating arrangements and basic facilities. Every classroom is a smart class (no A/C). The labs are all Wi-Fi enabled with modern computers and architecture (A/C enabled). The library is big, well maintained, and has a large collection of books and reading space. Extra books can be provided on demand. Basic hostel facilities include bed, mattress, pillow, and bathroom items. Every room has average Wi-Fi with 16 Mbps speed. Mess food quality is low and ...

reviews.review_heading: The college is best. The campus area is clean and fresh with a nice environment.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are awesome. All the needed things are present here. I would rate 8 out of 10 for the canteen. The food and everything is good. We are enjoying our college life. Classrooms are very nice with AC and Wi-Fi connectivity. The learning phase is going on, it has a good library where we can study.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by SMIT - Sikkim Manipal Institute of Technology, Sikkim Manipal UniversityReviewed on 12 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: All-around campus with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and faculty are good. Many facilities are provided by the department as well as the college. We can do whatever project we want to perform, and our department supports our projects and needs. Wi-Fi quality is a bit disappointing on campus, almost everyone uses 5G in college because Jio 5G has very high internet speed on campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sikkim Manipal Institute of Medical Sciences, GangtokReviewed on 28 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty .
reviews.review_text: The college has well-developed labs with all the equipment. Proper hygiene and safety protocols are followed. Free Wi-Fi and a 9 AM to 9 PM library facility are provided to every student. The food in the mess is hygienic and tasty. Everyone interested in sports is also encouraged to participate in fests.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Sikkim Manipal College of NursingReviewed on 24 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with facilities and good placements are provided.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in advanced classrooms. Library facilities are available, and drinking water facilities are provided. Campus is quite big and there are indoor games such as badminton, chess, etc. New basketball courts are being constructed, and even the gym is available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Sikkim Manipal College of PhysiotherapyReviewed on 24 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It comes under India's top 3 physiotherapy colleges.
reviews.review_text: Describing the infrastructure was reasonable since it was a professional course. The library and classrooms were pretty nice and were equipped with everything. Our college offered every opportunity in sports and extracurricular activities. It was the best college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by SMIT - Sikkim Manipal Institute of Technology, Sikkim Manipal UniversityReviewed on 24 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Sikkim Manipal Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: SMIT has six academic blocks, including labs, workshops, a library, and reading rooms. Besides this, it also has two hostels, one for boys and one for girls. The campus includes one ground and a sports block with a swimming facility. The hostel facilities are good, with each room accommodating two students and a floor warden assigned to each floor. The food in the mess is also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Sikkim Manipal College of PhysiotherapyReviewed on 22 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Tour of Sikkim Manipal Institute.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is very good. It is situated in the lap of mother nature, allowing students to enjoy a natural and peaceful environment throughout their studies. All classrooms are well-equipped, and the library has a wide range of books. However, the quality of food in the mess is not very good, though over time, students get habituated to it.

reviews.review_heading: The bestest online course
reviews.review_text: Nice

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sikkim Manipal College of NursingReviewed on 7 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Nursing college overall overview.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available include Wi-Fi, and lawns for each semester. Students are equipped very well. Classrooms are big and spacious with projectors and mics to be heard. The library is available with a wide variety of books. The hostel is good, with three students in one room. The quality of the food in the mess is not good, but the canteen is fine. Medical facilities have a 70 percent discount for students. Sports grounds are available, like basketball, football, volleyball, and badminton courts....

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by SMIT - Sikkim Manipal Institute of Technology, Sikkim Manipal UniversityReviewed on 27 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good, you get good education, and can live a college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. The college has many buildings and has a playground. All facilities are available. The hostel is also very big the hostel rooms are spacious and hygienic. There is a marina where there is good food and indoor games, a gym, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by SMIT - Sikkim Manipal Institute of Technology, Sikkim Manipal UniversityReviewed on 24 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: I am happy with my decision to join college as it is better than my expectations.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities and infrastructure. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Students can go to the library for studies. Classrooms are well-maintained. There are labs for every department. In the hostel, students get two choices to stay one for single and one for double. Students get a gym, a swimming pool, and an indoor court for basketball and badminton. Students can use an outdoor court as their choice.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by SMIT - Sikkim Manipal Institute of Technology, Sikkim Manipal UniversityReviewed on 23 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college experience was okay for me. Someone who wants to explore nearby locations.
reviews.review_text: The course is outdated and many of the PPTs are too old, and the same PPT is used to teach us with a few minor changes. We weren't provided with any industry visits. New teachers were nice and put effort into teaching. The hostel was fine, clean, and well-maintained. The lift was not serviced on a timely basis, but it was okay for me.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Sikkim Manipal College of PhysiotherapyReviewed on 10 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Sikkim Manipal University of Medical Science
reviews.review_text: The library is well equipped with a wide range of books for every department, and classrooms also have smart boards. The infrastructure of this college is pretty good, not very good; here they don't have a large campus. The quality of food in the mess is okay, and in the canteen, you can find good food.

review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is below standard. But they are improving bit by bit every day. There is a recreational hall with a TV and table tennis. A mess is decent. reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is the best in quality.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides students with a degree that enables them to be their own master. Students can start their chamber, start experimenting and get more exposure to patients. It gives them the best opportunity to get a post-graduate degree, and at least it gives its base. This college is the oldest in India, but it is also the best college with a research facility.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is not that good. However, it is located in a very good position near Bidhannagar railway station. Quality of food served here is good, but the Wi-Fi facility is not available. The atmosphere is very friendly with the senior students. Bathrooms are somewhat better, and the rooms are well-spacious.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Join if you love Ayurveda and want to make a well-established professional medical career in it.

review_content.Placements: It is a professional course. So knowledge and skills matter at the end of the day. Those who have studied well and completed their MD have secured jobs and earned lakhs through private practice. The highest package depends upon your skills; you can earn crores in business. The lowest package is INR 3 lakh per year. The average package offered is INR 8.5 lakh per year. Ayurvedic companies like Patanjali, Baidyanath, Himalaya, etc. offer placements. All the students get internships from the government. Also, you will get approx. INR 30000 per month while doing an internship. You have several options after this course, you can own a company, be the business head, or run a research and development unit.

review_summary.college_name: J.B. Roy State Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has very good infrastructure.

content.Placements: It is a very good college. 95% of students are placed in the course. The highest package is 5 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. 99% of students got internships in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available and good. Labs are very good. The classrooms are beautiful and nice. Everything is nice. All the teachers are good and monitor all students. Sports facilities are good. Canteen food is always healthy.
content.Faculty: All the teachers are good and guide all the students well like a parent. They teach us morally. All the teachers are good, especially Supriyo sir, Asraful sir etc. Many other teachers are good. This course is relevant and good. Semester exams are not much difficult.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best in quality.

content.Placements: Our college provides students with a degree that enables them to be their own master. Students can start their chamber, start experimenting and get more exposure to patients. It gives them the best opportunity to get a post-graduate degree, and at least it gives its base. This college is the oldest in India, but it is also the best college with a research facility.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is not that good. However, it is located in a very good position near Bidhannagar railway station. Quality of food served here is good, but the Wi-Fi facility is not available. The atmosphere is very friendly with the senior students. Bathrooms are somewhat better, and the rooms are well-spacious.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Join if you love Ayurveda and want to make a well-established professional medical career in it.

content.Placements: It is a professional course. So knowledge and skills matter at the end of the day. Those who have studied well and completed their MD have secured jobs and earned lakhs through private practice. The highest package depends upon your skills; you can earn crores in business. The lowest package is INR 3 lakh per year. The average package offered is INR 8.5 lakh per year. Ayurvedic companies like Patanjali, Baidyanath, Himalaya, etc. offer placements. All the students get internships from the government. Also, you will get approx. INR 30000 per month while doing an internship. You have several options after this course, you can own a company, be the business head, or run a research and development unit.

Vidyasagar University popular programmes are BSc, BBA, & MSc. BSc & MSc students are placed in top companies such as Accenture, ICICI Bank, Switz India, Cognizant, & others. BSc students can work as Research Analysts, Data Scientists, Data Architects, & others. For the exchange of research materials, reports, publications, & other academic information, the university has signed MoUs with various professional organisations, colleges, & others.
Vidyasagar University West Bengal MSc students can grab the scholarships provided by the university. The scholarships are provided based on the eligibility criteria decided by the university. Overall, Midnapore Vidyasagar University is one of the top universities present in India. faqs.answer: A:    At the postgraduate level, the university offers two-year MSc courses to students. The fee changes every year. The total tuition fees for the MSc course is INR 920 - INR 68,600. There are various other fee components and for them, please visit the official website of Vidyasagar University. faqs.answer: A:    As per the Vidyasagar University's admission guidelines there is no entrance exam required for LLM. Admission to LLM is based on candidate's performance in the qualifying exam, i.e., pass the LLB (Graduate examination in Law) with a minimum 50% aggregate for general students and 45%  for SC/ ST/ OBC students. There is no age bar for admission in law college in West Bengal.
faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for LLM at Vidyasagar University?

faqs.answer: A:    The cost of LLM at Vidyasagar University is around INR 50,000. The LLM programme is offered in the university campus and via its affiliation colleges as well. overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BCA at Vidyasagar University?
overview_faqs.answer: At the undergraduate level, Vidyasagar University offers three-year BCA courses to students. The total tuition fees for the BCA course is between INR 2,780 and INR 72,010. The eligibility criteria for the BCA course is Class 12 with a minimum of 45 aggregate and the accepted exams are CBSE 12th and WBCHSE. The seats are limited so apply early for admission to various undergraduate and postgraduate courses at Vidyasagar University.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for MSc at Vidyasagar University?
overview_faqs.answer: At the postgraduate level, the university offers two-year MSc courses to students. The fee changes every year. The total tuition fees for the MSc course is INR 920 - INR 68,600. There are various other fee components and for them, please visit the official website of Vidyasagar University. It's a state university so the fee is not very high but even if the student finds the fee very high, they can apply for the various scholarships provided by the university. Every year the university provides scholarships to eligible students in collaboration with various industries and companies. The candidates must prepare well for the entrance exams like MAT, XAT, CAT, and others. If giving MAT, candidates must prepare according to the MAT exam pattern and attempt as many MAT question papers as possible.

overview_faqs.question: What is the cost of MBA at Vidyasagar University?
overview_faqs.answer: The cost of Vidyasagar University ranges from INR 63,200 to INR 7 lakh. The MBA programme is offered in the university campus and via its affiliation colleges, as well. The fee might differ from college to college. Candidates might have to pay another one-time fee at the time of admission. The fee is sourced from various sources. Hence, its indicative.

review_summary.college_name: Vidyasagar University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: If you have many options and no financial problem, you can go to another option.

content.Placements: 40 percent of students got placed from my course. No package given, only a salary of Rs. 12000 per month. No top company hires from our college. A physiotherapist has a great role but no role in our lives. Our college could not provide any placement. Our internship does not give any salary.
content.Infrastructure: There is a library, labs, and Wi-Fi, but only for teachers. You can use the library as a student, labs are used only for practical time. There are no facilities in the hostel, hotels are used only by hospital staff and nurses. There is a canteen with only tea and coffee.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is so good and meritorious college, and teachers are so friendly.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of students are placed. The highest package is 4 LPA and the lowest is 1 LPA, but if a student is meritorious, he/she can secure good packages. Top recruiting companies are TCS and HONDA. Almost 30% of students get internships in various companies. Developer is the most famous role.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is included in computer labs, and classrooms are clean. We have two libraries: one is the departmental library and the other is the central library. The canteen is good but a little expensive. Hostels are neat and clean and maintain rules and regulations. The college sponsors an annual sports day.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Vidyasagar University, Midnapore, West Bengal.

content.Learning Experience: Intern training for us started from the final year by various professional trainers from corporates. For supporting courses, all kinds of resources are readily prepared and delivered to us for studying.
content.Placements: Conduent, Bajaj Finance, Kotak Life Insurance, and other banking companies are the leading companies that may be involved in the hiring process of our department. The average package offered may start from 3.2 LPA.
content.Faculty: Teachers usually used to tease the students instead of appraising us. But they are phenomenal in the area of teaching, pushing the students to achieve good grades in a short period by providing continuous practice.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Finance - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty.

content.Placements: People specialized in Marketing are getting placed very quickly, but other majors like finance, HR, and data analytics are struggling a little bit. Marketing special students are getting placed very quickly. All the students will get a mandatory Summer Internship Project and Live Projects in different companies.
content.Infrastructure: The study rooms are really good with AC, Wi-Fi, and projectors. Library is quite big. Lots of books and daily newspapers. The canteen is small with just a coffee machine. You have to pay for your coffee. There is no hostel for the college, you have to arrange PG on your own.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My point of view on this college.

content.Placements: The university is very good. Basically, the university placement facility is very low, few students are placed for this course. The highest salary package is 1.8 LPA per annum, and the lowest salary package is 1 LPA per annum. No one got an internship for this course.
content.Infrastructure: The university has good infrastructure. The college provides many things, like a canteen, library, and lab. All important books are available in the college library, and the classrooms are neat and clean. The university also provides playing areas for cricket, football, volleyball, etc.

admission_overview.college_name: Vidyasagar University Admission 2026: Courses, Application Process, Eligibility & Fees

admission_overview.title: Vidyasagar University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Vidyasagar University admission is open. Admission to various UG and PG courses is both entrance and merit-based. The university offers various UG, PG, diploma, and Doctoral level courses such as BSc, BA, BCA, MA, MSc, MCA, etc., in the streams of Law, Education, Science, and Arts. Vidyasagar University has 78 affiliated colleges that offer UG, PG, and research courses across numerous specialisations. For a few courses such as MCA and MBA, students must qualify for some entrance exam accepted by the college. Candidates who want to get admitted to courses running in the colleges/ institutes affiliated with Vidyasagar University must fill out the application form on the concerned college/ institute website. Students can also pursue distance education from the Directorate of Distance Education VU. Candidates applying at DDE VU must note that the admissions are on a first-come, first-served basis.

admission_process.title: Vidyasagar University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Vidyasagar University conducts a step-by-step process for admission to the offered courses.Vidyasagar University admission processinvolves an online application process, shortlisting, provisional list, final admissions, etc. Find below the completeVidyasagar University admission process 2026:

Candidates must fill out the application inonline modeby visiting the university's official website. The applicants have to fill in the form with their details, and academic details and upload the scanned copy of all the mark sheets & certificates, photos, and signatures. While submitting the application form, pay the application fee as well.

The university releases its merit lists of the shortlisted candidates for various courses. Once the application form is submitted, it will be scrutinized and shortlisted based on the eligibility criteria, academic performance, valid national-level exam score, etc.
Once the selection process is completed, students need to submit their documents for verification and pay the course fee within a stipulated time.

placement_data.title: Vidyasagar University Placement overview 2024
paragraphs: The placement details for the Class of 2024 are yet to be released. However, Vidyasagar University has released the placement details for batch passed out in 2022. As per the report, the highest package offered during Vidyasagar University placements in 2022 was INR 8.50 LPA. Further, the participating recruiters placed 249 students of the batch 2022 in various sectors . The top recruiters of Vidyasagar University placements in 2022 included Accenture, Cognizant, Infosys, Reliance, Capgemini, TCS, Syneos Health, Virchow Biotech, Punjab National Bank, L&T, etc.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MSc at Vidyasagar University?
faqs.answer: At the postgraduate level, the university offers two-year MSc courses to students. The fee changes every year. The total tuition fees for the MSc course is INR 920 - INR 68,600. There are various other fee components and for them, please visit the official website of Vidyasagar University. It's a state university so the fee is not very high but even if the student finds the fee very high, they can apply for the various scholarships provided by the university. Every year the university provides scholarships to eligible students in collaboration with various industries and companies. The candidates must prepare well for the entrance exams like MAT , XAT , CAT , and others. If giving MAT, candidates must prepare according to the MAT exam pattern and attempt as many MAT question papers as possible.

highlights.description: Vidyasagar University is one of India’s top institutes. It is ranked #151-200 by the NIRF 2025 under the University category, and #51-100 under State Public University. institute is well-known for its well-structured academic curriculum, excellent faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The Vidyasagar University rankings have been explained in the article below:

nirf.description:
Vidyasagar University has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'University' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Vidyasagar University indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Vidyasagar University's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been noticed that in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Vidyasagar University's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

hostel.description:
Hostels are provided with facilities of playing Badminton, Volley Ball, Cricket and indoor games like Carrom, Chess, and Ludo. The university has a students’ Amenity Centre for both Boys and Girls’ situated by to very close the students’ hostels where the residential students can avail the facility of Gymnasium equipped with multi-gym and a good number of other exercise equipment. All the students’ hostels of the university are provided with computers with internet facility
and medical facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Vidyasagar Institute of HealthReviewed on 10 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: If you have many options and no financial problem, you can go to another option.
reviews.review_text: There is a library, labs, and Wi-Fi, but only for teachers. You can use the library as a student, labs are used only for practical time. There are no facilities in the hostel, hotels are used only by hospital staff and nurses. There is a canteen with only tea and coffee.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Prabhat Kumar CollegeReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is so good and meritorious college, and teachers are so friendly.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is included in computer labs, and classrooms are clean. We have two libraries: one is the departmental library and the other is the central library. The canteen is good but a little expensive. Hostels are neat and clean and maintain rules and regulations. The college sponsors an annual sports day.

reviews.review_heading: Vidyasagar University, Midnapore, West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Intern training for us started from the final year by various professional trainers from corporates. For supporting courses, all kinds of resources are readily prepared and delivered to us for studying.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by IQ City United World School of BusinessReviewed on 26 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The study rooms are really good with AC, Wi-Fi, and projectors. Library is quite big. Lots of books and daily newspapers. The canteen is small with just a coffee machine. You have to pay for your coffee. There is no hostel for the college, you have to arrange PG on your own.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Egra Sarada Shashi Bhusan CollegeReviewed on 17 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My point of view on this college.
reviews.review_text: The university has good infrastructure. The college provides many things, like a canteen, library, and lab. All important books are available in the college library, and the classrooms are neat and clean. The university also provides playing areas for cricket, football, volleyball, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Midnapore CollegeReviewed on 29 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not good. There is no space for a single bed, and all students get sharing rooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Haldia Law College (HLC)
reviews.review_heading: Decent studies, supportive staff, poor hostel, nice teaching, average campus, and okay placement.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, moot court, and room. Hostel facilities are average like not too much good, or not too much bad okay. Canteen food is also good. Mess food is okay. We have medical facilities. Sports and games include different games for boys and girls.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Midnapore CollegeReviewed on 20 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This is all about our College.
reviews.review_text: Classroom is huge for 100 students, neat and clean. 3 classrooms are allotted for this course. Laminar room inside the laboratory. Wi-Fi is available, but not for students. Hostels are good, and food is also good. College has a big canteen with a variety of food, as well as dinner and lunch.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Garhbeta CollegeReviewed on 26 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is not very good for placement, but otherwise it is good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are average, and while there is a library available, there are no Wi-Fi facilities or proper labs for practical learning. Hostels are average, and food is okay but not exceptional. There is no medical facility available on campus. However, institution conducts sports events like cricket, volleyball, and other games to encourage student participation and maintain a balance between academics and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_text: The college has 2 labs (software & hardware) with 1 PC for each student. The library provides access to books. Wi-Fi is not available. The hostel is clean and peaceful, and the canteen food is average. Mess is also available at Rs. 1000. The college has an indoor stadium. Classrooms are average. One smart classroom is available.

reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in our hostel and classrooms, like Wi-Fi, a fan, and labs. There is an average quality of hostel and good quality of labs in our class  Classrooms and labs are AC. There are three types of labs. The library is very good and all books are provided.

faqs.answer: A:    Karuna Medical College has received an impressive review rating of 4 on Placements based on 4 feedback of verified Shiksha students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Karuna Medical College provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in stream like Medicine & Health Sciences, and have a fee structure of around INR 27,32,145 to 35,45,010. UG programs include MBBS. Further, the PG programs include MD.

faqs.answer: A:    Karuna Medical College provides programmes including MD, MBBS in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Biochemistry, Microbiology, Pathology, Pharmacology, Physiology, Anatomy.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good college to study but poor academics.

review_content.Placements: This course is not about placements. The thing is we have to practice ourselves and develop that skills. Skilled Doctors can get placements easily. Then students can avail the opportunity of examining the patients and develop their skills. But the college is awesome.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has average facilities. The Classrooms are well furnished and the students get a better opportunity to study and listen to the classes. There are amazing Laboratories. Where students can study well. No Wi-Fi facility but there is an internet room where the students can avail themselves. There is a large central lib that provides an amazing ambiance to study.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It has average faculty members, and the infrastructure is not good.

review_content.Placements: There is no guarantee for placements, but the college has good value. The exams are very tough as compared to other universities. The average salary package for the internship is approximately Rs.18,000-20,000 per month, and it keeps on increasing.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this college, the hostel and food facilities are average. The gym is available for free of cost, but students cannot join the gym before the second year. There is ground for football, basketball, cricket, and volleyball. Management doesn't organise a lot of events, so students themselves organise most of the events.

individual_reviews.title: A good college which offers good academics.

content.Placements: Our college recruits around 100 students every year. Now it has been changed to around 150 students. You can be exempted from tuition fees if you are coming from a minority category. For merit students, maybe around 8 Lacs. The highest fees will be charged from NRIs. Everyone students can do the mandatory internship after they have cleared all subjects of every year.

hostel_campus.college_name: Karuna Medical College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: A good college which offers good academics.
reviews.review_text: There are separate for each year. Wi-Fi and library facilities are also available on the campus. Mess is located within the campus premises. Canteen facilities are also available. Nonveg food is provided once daily. Mess food is good as they are provided by the top caterers of the town.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for studies.
reviews.review_text: The college may be lacking in terms of infrastructure compared to other colleges. The campus is not that big compared to other government medical colleges I have been to. But all of the minimum requirements are met at this college for the students by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college to study but poor academics.
reviews.review_text: The college has average facilities. The Classrooms are well furnished and the students get a better opportunity to study and listen to the classes. There are amazing Laboratories. Where students can study well. No Wi-Fi facility but there is an internet room where the students can avail themselves. There is a large central lib that provides an amazing ambiance to study.

reviews.review_heading: It has average faculty members, and the infrastructure is not good.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostel and food facilities are average. The gym is available for free of cost, but students cannot join the gym before the second year.  There is ground for football, basketball, cricket, and volleyball. Management doesn't organise a lot of events, so students themselves organise most of the events.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty , really good infrastructure
reviews.review_text:
Seperate building fir college and hospital 
5 lecture hall for with AC 
Hostel are near to the college around 5 min walking distance 
Mess is near to hostel ,  food quality is good 
Including breakfast , lunch , tea and snacks , dinner
If you are eating food from mess then u can take refund

reviews.review_heading: Review of Karuna Medical College.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were good. Comfortable saunas were available in our college. The hostel rooms were good for studies. Restrooms were good. Our college provided food and accommodation to students. Wi-Fi was available in our college. Labs were good with all facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is not a good college.
reviews.review_text: It has good facilities and infrastructure compared to many other private colleges in Kerala, but no free Wi-Fi. The quality of the hostel is not good. The hostel fee is Rs. 4000 per month. The quality of mess food is not good. It costs Rs. 6000 per month. The mess service is not good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are fine.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students were placed by our college in top companies. The highest package is 3 Lacs per annum, and the lowest is 1.5 Lacs. These are extra classes to develop our personality. The college allows 1-2 months of holiday for internships and also provides time to complete them.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is available only for girls, but boys can stay in the village and Otur city by renting. Houses at Otur are available for students to live in at a perfect rent of up to Rs. 1,000 per month. The college campus consists of smart boards and Wi-Fi access.

faqs.question: Q: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at Sharadchandra Pawar College of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: Sharadchandra Pawar College of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityD.PharmaCandidate passed 10+2 (science stream) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics or Any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India from any recognised institute/board are eligible to applyB.PharmaCandidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council. The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State. Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible. Maharashtra State candidates must have to appear for MHTCET. All India Candidates need to appear for MHTCET/NEET. However, preference shall be given to the candidate obtaining non zero positive score in NEET over the candidates who obtained non zero score in MHTCET.M.PharmaFor sponsored candidates, minimum of two years of fulltime work experience in a registered firm/ company/industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.

reviews_list.review_title: It's new college but overall it's good to go.

review_content.Placements: As government medical college shivpuri is new college and started from 2019 so there isn't any passout batch in this college, so can't tell about the placements. individual_reviews.title: It's new college but overall it's good to go.

content.Placements: As government medical college shivpuri is new college and started from 2019 so there isn't any passout batch in this college, so can't tell about the placements. But as in MBBS obviously you'll get internship in the last year and the college has it's own hospital so no need to worry about that.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is just like a 5 star hotel. Classrooms are good. Practical labs are well-equipped, library is there with all the needed books. individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college.

content.Placements: After this course, you will get placements in government hospitals or medical colleges. Students have to do one year of internships, which is compulsory.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure. We have a library for studies. Our college has a cafeteria. We have different laboratories for different departments. Our college provides sports facilities and well-maintained hostels for boys and girls.
content.Faculty: All faculty members are highly qualified, experienced, and supportive. Our college is associated with the government hospital, so students get practical training in different fields, which includes orthopedics, obstetrics and gynecology, medicine, surgery, community health, child health, emergency medicine, etc.

description: Government Medical College, Shivpuri cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Government Medical College, Shivpuri NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 16919 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Medical College, Shivpuri MBBS cutoff 2025 was 16919 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 17022 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Government Medical College, Shivpuri accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Government Medical College, Shivpuri NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 90955 to 142918. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Government Medical College, Shivpuri MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Pharmacology, followed by MD in Preventive and Social Medicine/ Community Medicine and MD in Microbiology. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 90955, 102224 and 142918, respectively.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Government Medical College, Shivpuri MS cutoff 2025 was released across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for different categories under the Home State quota. As per the Round 2 cutoff data, the most competitive MS specialisation for admission was MS in Orthopaedics, with MP NEET PG cutoff rank of 14329.

review_summary.college_name: S.S. Jain Subodh PG College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, good placements in the last years.

content.Placements: My college is S. Jain Subodh PG College, Rambagh Circle, Jaipur, Rajasthan. In my college, the students placed by companies is 30-32%. The highest package is approximately 12 LPA, the lowest is 3.5 LPA, and the average package is 6.5 LPA from all companies. My course internship percentage is 60%. The top role is HR in their company.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is very attractive and provides a good environment for students. The classrooms are new, there are labs for every subject or course, and a good Wi-Fi connection for students, along with a modern library with full resources. A hostel is managed by the college samiti with a good environment. The college holds many sports and games at the district level. The canteen is good with pure food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The best college in Jaipur for student who wants to do their graduation and also post graduation.

content.Placements: Our college gives opportunities to students for placement in the final year and even 4th sem students can try just by making a CV and the college had a personalized WhatsApp group from which they inform students. Almost 60 percent of those who were interested in jobs got their placement.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides excellent infrastructure and the classes were good. Labs for Physics and Chemistry were in very good condition with each and every instrument that we needed.
content.Faculty: Teachers were always helpful and they never decline to answer any questions asked. Teachers take classes on a regular basis and if we study the classes properly, almost 75 percent of the paper comes from the notes of teachers who had taught in the lecture, so there was not much difficulty in clearing the semester exam. It was relevant for the course curriculum .

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: S.S. Jain Subodh College provides really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: I don't know which students in my class are placed. The average package is 4.5 LPA. College staff are friendly to all students. All information is known to every student in our college. The students get internships. The percentage is 67%, but I don't know which companies appoint them. The highest is H. R.
content.Infrastructure: Courses in the college are peaceful and simple for a student to understand. Our college provides the best facilities. It includes Wi-Fi, well-equipped classrooms, and a student library. The hostel has many facilities provided by the college department. The canteen serves good food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: An academic powerhouse with A+ prestige and great infrastructure with placement support.

content.Placements: There are approximately 67% students who are placed. The highest package is around 8 LPA. Banks and other automotive companies recruit from our college. 70% of students got internships from our course in automotive companies and the banking industry. Students directly take their degrees on the basis of internships.
content.Infrastructure: There is a library, conference hall, and AC classrooms. There are the best quality facilities of water and sanitation. There are lots of departments of different streams. All the rooms are in good condition, and the office processes are systematic. There is a fan in every room, and they are working properly. The building maintenance is done by the college staff every year, such as denting and painting.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in English - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good curriculum, good staff, good infrastructure and a phenomenal library.

content.Placements: Students got placed in my visionity are around 56 percent and the highest package for fresher is 6.7 LPA. There are many companies to apply for. Mainly jobs for bank, airways, travel companies, and other data management companies and MNC are here to recruit students.
content.Infrastructure: Classroom, labs, and Wi-Fi is good, but the library of our college is phenomenal. It has got very niche works of my subject as well as other subjects. My subject is English Literature. I have got a total of 5 papers in my final year exams. They are exceptional.

admission_process.title: S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College admissions 2025 is open. The college is affiliated with theUniversity of Rajasthan, Jaipur.S.S. Jain Subodh Pg Collegeoffers various UG, PG, PhD and diploma courses in the fields of Engineering, Business Administration, Computer Science and others, such as BCA, BBA, MSc, and many more, along with a few diploma courses. Admission to all the courses is merit-based. Further, for admission to PhD, candidates are required to apply and appear in RTU DAT test. Candidates looking for admission are advised to read the below article to know more about S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College admission 2025, along with course-wise eligibility and selection criteria:

S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College admission to all the courses is merit-based. However, for admission to PhD university accepts RTU DAT entrance exam scores. Admission to all UG, PG, diploma and PhD courses is open. Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective course. Additionally, must appear for the entrance exam for admission to PhD courses. The table below lists courses offered at S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College courses eligibility along with their accepted entrance exams, & selection process:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria

Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreS.S. Jain Subodh Pg College courses

S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College admission process contains various steps that are required to be followed by the candidate to get admission. The admission process begins with filling out the application form, applying, and appearing for the entrance exam accepted by the college. The last step is to submit theS.S. Jain Subodh Pg College course feefor final seat confirmation. Given below is the step-by-step S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College admission process 2025:
Step 1: S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College Application Process

Candidates interested in admission to any courses at the college are required to fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria set by the college. After that, candidates must fill out the application form online by visiting the official website of the college.
Step 2: S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College Selection Round

Satya Institute of Technology and Management offers entrance and merit-based admission to all the courses. Additionally, to get admission, candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria, i.e., passClass 10and Class 12, for admission to the UG course. Further, for admission to PG courses, candidates are required to pass a graduation degree from a recognised board. Further, for admission to diploma courses, candidates are required to pass Class 12 from a recognised board to get direct admission. Additionally, candidates must fulfil the selection criteria, i.e., apply and appear forRTU DATfor admission to PhD courses.
Step 3: S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College Seat Confirmation

S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College releases the merit list based on the last qualifying exam scores. Further, for Phd the college releases a list based on entrance exam scores. After getting selected on the merit list, candidates are required to make a course fee payment within the given deadline to grab seats.

outlook.description:
S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Science' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. It has been seen that in the 'Science' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College's rank is #66, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'BBA', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College's rank is #48, the same as last year's rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Commerce' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College's rank is #50, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, good placements in the last years.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is very attractive and provides a good environment for students. The classrooms are new, there are labs for every subject or course, and a good Wi-Fi connection for students, along with a modern library with full resources. A hostel is managed by the college samiti with a good environment. The college holds many sports and games at the district level. The canteen is good with pure food.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Jaipur for student who wants to do their graduation and also post graduation.
reviews.review_text: The college provides excellent infrastructure and the classes were good. Labs for Physics and Chemistry were in very good condition with each and every instrument that we needed.

reviews.review_heading: S.S. Jain Subodh College provides really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Courses in the college are peaceful and simple for a student to understand. Our college provides the best facilities. It includes Wi-Fi, well-equipped classrooms, and a student library. The hostel has many facilities provided by the college department. The canteen serves good food.

reviews.review_heading: An academic powerhouse with A+ prestige and great infrastructure with placement support.
reviews.review_text: There is a library, conference hall, and AC classrooms. There are the best quality facilities of water and sanitation. There are lots of departments of different streams. All the rooms are in good condition, and the office processes are systematic. There is a fan in every room, and they are working properly. The building maintenance is done by the college staff every year, such as denting and painting.

reviews.review_heading: Good curriculum, good staff, good infrastructure and a phenomenal library.
reviews.review_text: Classroom, labs, and Wi-Fi is good, but the library of our college is phenomenal. It has got very niche works of my subject as well as other subjects. My subject is English Literature. I have got a total of 5 papers in my final year exams. They are exceptional.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it is good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our classroom and the lab is so good and well maintained. The lab is well maintained and lab facilities are so good. The college canteen is good and the food is also good and hygiene. Sports and games are also conducted by college .

reviews.review_heading: If you want a degree go to any college, but if you want to become worthy, come to our college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good facilities and the classrooms are cleaned and all the required books are available in the library. The college does not have its own hostel, but the canteen food is really good and there are almost all sports activities available.

reviews.review_heading: I want to recommend this for B.Sc/B.A./B.Com because the teaching quality is very good.
reviews.review_text: The classroom infrastructure is okay, not great. Wi-Fi is not available here. However, the library has good infrastructure and a peaceful environment. There are no college hostels available here, but many PGs are situated in this area, so you do not have to face hostel problems.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is supportive and the campus life is balanced and vibrant.
reviews.review_text: This college has pretty spacious classrooms, a well-stocked library, labs, and sports facilities. The canteen is satisfactory but needs improvement. There are no hostels. The digital infrastructure is limited but sufficient to provide a quality education. There is no Wi-Fi. The furniture is mediocre.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my college life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good, and library is also a good place to study, classrooms are well-equipped with air conditioning. Also, there are good medical facilities, mess quality is okay, like it can be eaten, not very tasty, but okay types, and also you can play cricket.

reviews.review_heading: It is a nice college for studies and graduation. It offers an affordable fee for any courses.
reviews.review_text: Nice infrastructure is available in our college. The college has a cafeteria and a sitting area near it, which provides tasty and hygienic food. There is a library and Wi-Fi facility in labs. Facilities for games and sports are also there. Classrooms are also nice and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Digital classroom, enlarged library, hi-tech labs, etc., were the qualities of Subodh. Canteen and medical facilities were also available. Hostels were clean and tidy always and time to time maintained by the staffs. Mess and canteen food were tasty and eatable not like other colleges. More of that we always enjoyed with our friends in hostel rooms. Sports academy like cricket, football, and badminton were also very great because of infrastructure and experienced coaches.

reviews.review_heading: S. S. Jain Subodh PG College review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities were good. But when it comes to the hostel, it was very old and was going to be demolished soon, with a new hostel set to be built with more capacity. In the hostel, you will get all the facilities like Wi-Fi. This college offered various facilities to its students like a cyber library open 21 hours from 8:00 AM to 5:00 AM, free bus service covering hostels and all faculty members. It also provided free medical facilities at the University Hospital, etc.

reviews.review_heading: My college life in a small paragraph.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is better compared to any other college. Whether you talk about classrooms, parking areas, the library, or labs are all good and well-maintained. As per the requirement and necessity, changes are made annually. There is no Wi-Fi facility in the college. There are no hostels in our college, in fact, you have to find one as near as possible to the college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very excellent and has a very good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: S. jain subhodh PG college was very good, first time was go in my college I was shocked it was very big actually I belong to village so I was shocked I was seen first time big buildings so. In my college different buildings for different department. College placed on one of the best location called rambagh of Jaipur city around 300m near the sms stadium, moti dungri, rambagh palace, birla mandir, Even albert hall museum also near by college. college_info.college_name: S.S. Jain Subodh PG College Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The total tuition fee for BBA course at S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College is INR 84,200. The tuition fee of the course comprises multiple components. Candidates are required to pay the BBA course fee at the time of confirmed admission. For fee-related queries, candidates can contact the admission cell of the college via email or phone.

The fee structure at S.S. Jain Subodh Pg College contains several components. These include academic fees, hostel fees, mess fees, medical facilities, security deposits, caution money, and much more. The total fee of MCA is range between INR 1.3 lakh- INR 1.4 lakh. The tuition fees, are collected on a semester or annual basis.

S.S. Jain Subodh PG College offers scholarships under various schemes initiated by the Central/ State Government institutions. Students who are from privileged, needy and physically challenged groups are endowed with scholarships. The below-mentioned are S.S. Jain Subodh PG College scholarships:
S.S. Jain Subodh PG College Scholarships
Chief Minister Higher Education Scholarship
Kali Bai Bheel Medha
Endowment Scholarship
Sumedha Scholarship
Scholarship for Class Merit Holders
Protsahan Scholarship for Excellence
