college_info.college_name: School of Online Education, Bharati Vidyapeeth

highlights.summary: Summary not available

college_info.intro:
Bharati Vidyapeeth Online offers 4 online degree programmes, including MBA, BBA, MCA, and BCA. Apart from these, it also offers bachelor's degree and diploma courses in distance learning mode. Listed below are the flagship courses offered by Bharati Vidyapeeth Online
The online MBA program at Bharati Vidyapeeth Online is a two-year degree program that offers the flexibility of online learning. It allows you to enhance your management competencies at your own pace and convenience.
Eligibility - Graduate (10+2+3) from any recognised university.
Aggregate - At least 50% (45% for SC/ST) at graduate level university examination.
Online MBA Specializations -
BBA - The Bachelor of Business Administration (Honors) is a 48-month, 160-credit-hour program with 35 courses. The course applies a variety of teaching and learning methods, such as interactive lectures, assignments, case studies and discussion forums.
BCA - The Bachelor of Computer Application (Honors) is a 36-month + 12-month (Honors), 165-credit programme with 45 courses and minor and major projects. The course would prepare you for job roles as system analysts, system engineers, software engineers and programmers.
MCA - The two-year Online Master of Computer Applications (MCA) covers various topics, including software development, database management, network administration, and cybersecurity. The course combines theoretical coursework with practical hands-on exercises to help students gain proficiency in programming languages, software engineering principles, and emerging technologies.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Honour to be a part of Bharati Vidyapeeth Family. Make us even more than expected.

review_content.Placements: Associating with this university will definitely provide you with your dream job. Large MNC and reputed organisations recruit a number of students every year. For instance, a girl of BBA course from the same university (Delhi branch) was placed at Amazon with the highest package of INR 13 Lacs Per annum. The college has an amazing placement ever recorded.
review_content.Infrastructure: Being in any branch/constituent unit of this university is amazing. Especially, if talking about BVINR, Delhi. The college has a nice infrastructure with all amenities. Fully air-conditioned classes are available. Equipped with smart end projectors in each classroom. Overall, it is nice infrastructure.

faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for online MCA at Bharati Vidyapeeth Online are as follows - 10+2+3 in any stream or equivalent from any recognised university, satisfying the following conditions.Passed BCA/ Bachelor Degree in Computer Science Engineering or equivalent degree. OR Passed B.Sc./ B.Com./ B.A. with additional bridge Courses (Bridge Course I/ Bridge Course II).OR Graduate in BE/ BTech/ BSc/BCom/BA/B.Voc/etc.. preferably with mathematics at the 10+2 level or at graduation level.The candidate should have secured at least 50% marks (45% for SC/ST) in aggregate at graduate level university examination.For students having no Mathematics background, compulsory bridge courses by the Bharati Vidyapeeth and additional bridge courses related to computer subjects should be completed.
faqs.question: Q: What are the eligibility criteria for online MCA at Bharati Vidyapeeth Online?

faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria and duration of the BBA programme at Bharati Vidyapeeth Online are 10+2 in any stream or equivalent from any recognised board. The duration of the BBA Three Year Degree Programme at the Bharati Vidyapeeth (Deemed to be University), Pune School of Online Education is six semesters (156 weeks), and that of the BBA (Honors) Degree Program is four years (208 weeks or 8 semesters) with multiple entry and exit options. Students are required to complete the 4 years degree programme within 7 years.
faqs.question: Q: What are the eligibility criteria and duration of the BBA programme at Bharati Vidyapeeth Online?

OR Passed B.Sc./ B.Com./ B.A. with additional bridge Courses (Bridge Course I/ Bridge Course II).OR Graduate in BE/ BTech/ BSc/BCom/BA/B.Voc/etc.. preferably with mathematics at the 10+2 level or at graduation level.The candidate should have secured at least 50% marks (45% for SC/ST) in aggregate at graduate level university examination.For students having no Mathematics background, compulsory bridge courses by the Bharati Vidyapeeth and additional bridge courses related to computer subjects should be completed.

lists: 10+2+3 in any stream or equivalent from any recognised university, satisfying the following conditions.
Passed BCA/ Bachelor Degree in Computer Science Engineering or equivalent degree.
Passed B.Sc./ B.Com./ B.A. with additional bridge Courses (Bridge Course I/ Bridge Course II).
Graduate in BE/ BTech/ BSc/BCom/BA/B.Voc/etc.. preferably with mathematics at the 10+2 level or at graduation level.
The candidate should have secured at least 50% marks (45% for SC/ST) in aggregate at graduate level university examination.
For students having no Mathematics background, compulsory bridge courses by the Bharati Vidyapeeth and additional bridge courses related to computer subjects should be completed.

The duration of the BBA Three Year Degree Programme at the Bharati Vidyapeeth (Deemed to be University), Pune School of Online Education is six semesters (156 weeks), and that of the BBA (Honors) Degree Program is four years (208 weeks or 8 semesters) with multiple entry and exit options. Students are required to complete the 4 years degree programme within 7 years.

reviews.review_text: Being in any branch/constituent unit of this university is amazing. Especially, if talking about BVINR, Delhi. The college has a nice infrastructure with all amenities. Fully air-conditioned classes are available. Equipped with smart end projectors in each classroom. Overall, it is nice infrastructure.
